items.title: SuperFE: A Scalable and Flexible Feature Extractor for ML-based Traffic Analysis Applications.
items.abstract: The feature extractor component in today's ML-based traffic analysis applications is becoming a key bottleneck. While mainstream software-based approaches can support flexible feature extraction, they fail to scale to multi-100Gbps network speed easily. Meanwhile, hardware-accelerated solutions can scale to high throughput, but cannot flexibly support generic traffic analysis applications. In this paper, we propose SuperFE, a feature extraction framework that allows users to extract traffic features efficiently and flexibly. SuperFE leverages the capabilities of both new-generation programmable switches and SmartNICs, with three key designs. First, SuperFE presents a user-friendly and extensible interface to support customized feature extraction policies, shielding underlying hardware implementation details and complexities. Second, SuperFE introduces a high-performance multi-granularity key-vector cache system in the programmable switches to batch necessary feature metadata for massive amounts of packets. Third, SuperFE exploits the multi-core parallel and hierarchical memory of SoC-based SmartNICs to achieve efficient feature computation with diverse streaming algorithms. Evaluations using our prototype demonstrate that SuperFE enables various state-of-the-art traffic analysis applications to efficiently extract features from multi-100Gbps raw traffic without compromising detection accuracy, and achieves nearly two orders of magnitude higher throughput than the software-based counterparts.
items.abstract_zh: 当今基于机器学习的流量分析应用程序中的特征提取器组件正在成为一个关键瓶颈。虽然主流的基于软件的方法可以支持灵活的特征提取，但它们无法轻松扩展到 100Gbps 的网络速度。同时，硬件加速解决方案可以扩展到高吞吐量，但无法灵活支持通用流量分析应用。在本文中，我们提出了SuperFE，一种特征提取框架，允许用户高效、灵活地提取流量特征。 SuperFE 利用了新一代可编程交换机和 SmartNIC 的功能，具有三种关键设计。首先，SuperFE 提供了一个用户友好且可扩展的界面，以支持定制的特征提取策略，屏蔽底层硬件实现细节和复杂性。其次，SuperFE 在可编程交换机中引入了高性能多粒度键向量缓存系统，以批量处理大量数据包所需的功能元数据。第三，SuperFE 利用基于 SoC 的 SmartNIC 的多核并行和分层内存，通过多种流算法实现高效的特征计算。使用我们的原型进行的评估表明，SuperFE 使各种最先进的流量分析应用程序能够有效地从多 100Gbps 原始流量中提取特征，而不影响检测精度，并且与基于软件的同类产品相比，吞吐量提高了近两个数量级。

items.title: Multiplexing Dynamic Deep Learning Workloads with SLO-awareness in GPU Clusters.
items.abstract: Deep learning (DL) inference services are widely recognized as crucial workloads in large-scale cloud clusters. However, due to the stringent latency requirements, cloud providers often over-provision GPU resources, resulting in underutilization of the available GPU potential. Although co-locating tasks on the same device can enhance utilization, ensuring Service Level Objectives (SLOs) guarantees for multiplexing highly dynamic inference services becomes extremely challenging due to significant resource interference.
items.abstract_zh: 深度学习 (DL) 推理服务被广泛认为是大规模云集群中的关键工作负载。然而，由于严格的延迟要求，云提供商经常过度配置 GPU 资源，导致可用 GPU 潜力的利用不足。尽管在同一设备上共置任务可以提高利用率，但由于严重的资源干扰，确保多路复用高度动态推理服务的服务级别目标 (SLO) 变得极具挑战性。

items.title: Hourglass: Enabling Efficient Split Federated Learning with Data Parallelism.
OHMiner: An Overlap-centric System for Efficient Hypergraph Pattern Mining.
items.abstract: Hypergraph Pattern Mining (HPM) aims to identify all the instances of user-interested subhypergraphs (patterns) in hypergraphs, which has been widely used in various applications. However, existing solutions either need significant enumeration overhead because they extend subhypergraphs at the granularity of vertices, or suffer from massive redundant computations because they often need to repeatedly fetch and process the same incident hyperedges for different vertices. This paper presents an overlap-centric system named OHMiner to efficiently support HPM. OHMiner proposes an overlap-centric execution model to determine the subhypergraphs isomorphism through computing and comparing overlaps among hyperedges using set operations. This model aims to efficiently handle the vertices that collectively share the same incident hyperedges. To automatically and precisely retrieve an arbitrary pattern's overlapping semantics without performing redundant set computations, OHMiner further proposes a redundancy-free compiler, which constructs an Overlap Intersection Graph (OIG) for the pattern, optimizes the OIG, and generates an overlap-centric execution plan to guide the procedure of HPM. Moreover, OHMiner designs an overlap-centric parallel execution engine, which adopts an incremental overlap-pruned approach to fast validate candidates for HPM. Additionally, it proposes a degree-aware data store to support efficient generation of candidates. Through evaluating OHMiner on a broad range of real-world hypergraphs with various patterns, our experimental results show that OHMiner outperforms the state-of-the-art HPM system by 5.4×-22.2×.
items.abstract_zh: 超图模式挖掘（HPM）旨在识别超图中用户感兴趣的子超图（模式）的所有实例，已广泛应用于各种应用中。然而，现有的解决方案要么需要大量的枚举开销，因为它们以顶点的粒度扩展子超图，要么遭受大量冗余计算，因为它们经常需要重复获取和处理不同顶点的相同事件超边。本文提出了一个名为 OHMiner 的以重叠为中心的系统，以有效支持 HPM。 OHMiner 提出了一种以重叠为中心的执行模型，通过使用集合运算计算和比较超边之间的重叠来确定子超图同构。该模型旨在有效地处理共同共享相同事件超边的顶点。为了在不执行冗余集合计算的情况下自动精确地检索任意模式的重叠语义，OHMiner 进一步提出了一种无冗余编译器，它为该模式构造重叠交集图（OIG），优化 OIG，并生成以重叠为中心的执行计划来指导 HPM 的过程。此外，OHMiner 设计了一个以重叠为中心的并行执行引擎，它采用增量重叠修剪方法来快速验证 HPM 的候选者。此外，它还提出了一个学位感知数据存储来支持高效生成候选人。通过在具有各种模式的广泛现实世界超图上评估 OHMiner，我们的实验结果表明，OHMiner 的性能比最先进的 HPM 系统高出 5.4×-22.2×。

items.title: Rakis: Secure Fast I/O Primitives Across Trust Boundaries on Intel SGX.
items.abstract: The use of Intel® Software Guard Extensions (SGX) offers robust security measures for shielding applications in untrusted environments. However, the performance overhead experienced by IO-intensive applications within SGX limits widespread adoption. Prior approaches have proposed the use of userspace kernel-bypass libraries such as Data Plane Development Kit (DPDK) inside SGX enclaves to enable direct access to IO devices. However, these solutions often come at the cost of increasing the Trusted Computing Base (TCB) size, expanding the attack surface, and complicating deployment. In this paper, we introduce Rakis, a comprehensive system that securely enables SGX enclave programs to leverage fast IO Linux kernel primitives without modifying user applications. Rakis prioritizes the security of its TCB components by employing rigorous software testing and verification methods, embodying a security-by-design approach. Importantly, Rakis achieves performance advantages without sacrificing TCB size or introducing deployment intricacies and demonstrates significant improvements in benchmark tests with a 4.6x increase in UDP network throughput compared to state-of-the-art SGX enclave LibOS (Gramine-SGX). To demonstrate the practical applicability of Rakis, we evaluate its performance on four real-world programs showcasing an average performance improvement of 2.8x compared to Gramine-SGX across all workloads.
items.abstract_zh: 英特尔® Software Guard Extensions (SGX) 的使用提供了强大的安全措施，可在不受信任的环境中保护应用程序。然而，SGX 内 IO 密集型应用程序所经历的性能开销限制了广泛采用。先前的方法建议在 SGX enclave 内使用用户空间内核旁路库，例如数据平面开发套件 (DPDK)，以实现对 IO 设备的直接访问。然而，这些解决方案通常以增加可信计算库 (TCB) 规模、扩大攻击面和使部署复杂化为代价。在本文中，我们介绍了 Rakis，这是一个综合系统，可以安全地使 SGX enclave 程序利用快速 IO Linux 内核原语，而无需修改用户应用程序。 Rakis 通过采用严格的软件测试和验证方法，体现安全设计方法，优先考虑 TCB 组件的安全性。重要的是，Rakis 在不牺牲 TCB 大小或引入复杂部署的情况下实现了性能优势，并且在基准测试中表现出显着改进，与最先进的 SGX enclave LibOS (Gramine-SGX) 相比，UDP 网络吞吐量提高了 4.6 倍。为了证明 Rakis 的实际适用性，我们在四个实际程序中评估了它的性能，结果表明，与 Gramine-SGX 相比，所有工作负载的平均性能提高了 2.8 倍。

items.title: Towards Efficient Flash Caches with Emerging NVMe Flexible Data Placement SSDs.
items.abstract: NVMe Flash-based SSDs are widely deployed in data centers to cache working sets of large-scale web services. As data centers face increasing sustainability demands, such as reduced carbon emissions, efficient management of Flash overprovisioning and endurance has become crucial. Our analysis demonstrates that mixing data with different lifetimes on Flash blocks results in high device garbage collection costs, which either reduce device lifetime or necessitate host overprovisioning. Targeted data placement on Flash to minimize data intermixing and thus device write amplification shows promise for addressing this issue.
items.abstract_zh: 基于 NVMe 闪存的 SSD 广泛部署在数据中心中，用于缓存大规模 Web 服务的工作集。随着数据中心面临日益增长的可持续性需求（例如减少碳排放），对闪存过度配置和耐用性的有效管理变得至关重要。我们的分析表明，在闪存块上混合具有不同生命周期的数据会导致较高的设备垃圾收集成本，这要么会缩短设备生命周期，要么需要主机过度配置。在闪存上进行有针对性的数据放置，以最大限度地减少数据混合，从而减少器件写入放大，有望解决这一问题。

items.title: BESA: Extending Bugs Triggered by Runtime Testing via Static Analysis.
items.abstract: Due to limited test cases and execution scenarios, runtime testing often has insufficient code coverage and thus misses many real bugs. To tackle this problem, we propose a novel idea that static analysis of the triggered bug in runtime testing can help extend and detect extra bugs missed by runtime testing. Based on this idea, we develop a new approach named BESA, which can extend null-pointer dereferences found by runtime testing via static analysis. It first collects trace information about the triggered bug in runtime testing, by monitoring PoC (Proof of Concept) execution or analyzing existing failure log. Then, with this trace information, BESA uses a backward propagation analysis based on the call stack of the triggered bug, to effectively identify source variables propagating problematic value to the buggy variable. Finally, according to each source variable, BESA uses a summary-based alias-aware analysis to efficiently track target variables aliased with the buggy variable for detecting extra bugs. We have evaluated BESA on 25 known null-pointer dereferences found by runtime testing in four popular programs (SQLite, VIM, GPAC and Linux kernel). BESA finds 57 extra bugs, and 18 of them are new bugs that have been confirmed.
items.abstract_zh: 由于测试用例和执行场景有限，运行时测试往往代码覆盖率不足，从而错过了许多真正的错误。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个新的想法，即对运行时测试中触发的错误进行静态分析可以帮助扩展和检测运行时测试遗漏的额外错误。基于这个想法，我们开发了一种名为BESA的新方法，它可以通过静态分析扩展运行时测试发现的空指针取消引用。它首先通过监视 PoC（概念验证）执行或分析现有故障日志来收集有关运行时测试中触发的错误的跟踪信息。然后，利用此跟踪信息，BESA 使用基于触发错误的调用堆栈的向后传播分析，以有效识别将有问题的值传播到有问题的变量的源变量。最后，根据每个源变量，BESA 使用基于摘要的别名感知分析来有效跟踪与 buggy 变量别名的目标变量，以检测额外的错误。我们对四个流行程序（SQLite、VIM、GPAC 和 Linux 内核）中的运行时测试发现的 25 个已知空指针取消引用进行了 BESA 评估。 BESA 发现了 57 个额外 bug，其中 18 个是已确认的新 bug。

items.title: Eva: Cost-Efficient Cloud-Based Cluster Scheduling.
items.abstract: Cloud computing offers flexibility in resource provisioning, allowing an organization to host its batch processing workloads cost-efficiently by dynamically scaling the size and composition of a cloud-based cluster - a collection of instances provisioned from the cloud. However, existing schedulers fail to minimize total cost due to suboptimal task and instance scheduling strategies, interference between co-located tasks, and instance provisioning overheads. We present Eva, a scheduler for cloud-based clusters that reduces the overall cost of hosting long-running batch jobs. Eva leverages reservation price from economics to derive the optimal set of instances to provision and task-to-instance assignments. Eva also takes into account performance degradation when co-locating tasks and quantitatively evaluates the trade-off between short-term migration overhead and long-term provision savings when considering a change in cluster configuration. Experiments on AWS EC2 and large-scale trace-driven simulations demonstrate that Eva reduces costs by 42% while incurring only a 15% increase in JCT, compared to provisioning a separate instance for each task.
items.abstract_zh: 云计算提供了资源配置的灵活性，允许组织通过动态扩展基于云的集群（从云中配置的实例的集合）的大小和组成来经济高效地托管其批处理工作负载。然而，由于任务和实例调度策略不理想、共置任务之间的干扰以及实例配置开销，现有调度程序无法最小化总成本。我们推出了 Eva，一种基于云的集群调度程序，可降低托管长时间运行的批处理作业的总体成本。 Eva 利用经济学中的预留价格来导出最佳实例集以进行配置和任务到实例分配。 Eva 还考虑了共置任务时的性能下降，并在考虑集群配置更改时定量评估短期迁移开销和长期配置节省之间的权衡。 AWS EC2 和大规模跟踪驱动模拟上的实验表明，与为每个任务配置单独的实例相比，Eva 可以降低 42% 的成本，同时 JCT 仅增加 15%。

items.title: Groot: Graph-Centric Row Reordering with Tree for Sparse Matrix Multiplications on Tensor Cores.
items.abstract: Sparse matrix multiplications are essential in scientific computing and machine learning applications. Recent researches offload sparse operations, such as sparse matrix-matrix multiplication (SpMM) and sampled dense-dense matrix multiplication (SDDMM), on Tensor Cores (TCs) for improved performance. However, their performance is often limited by the matrix's inherent sparsity and irregularity. In this paper, we find row reordering can potentially improve sparse operations on TCs, but existing reordering techniques exhibit limitations that hinder their effectiveness. To address the issues, we propose Groot, a graph-centric row reordering algorithm with tree. Groot aims to minimize row differences across the matrix, which is proved to be a NP-hard problem. To approximate the optimal solution, Groot firstly captures the local structure of the sparse matrix by constructing a k-nearest neighbor graph, where rows are represented as nodes. Then, it extracts a minimum spanning tree from the constructed graph for global structure optimization. Lastly, Groot traverses the extracted tree to obtain the final ordering. We evaluate Groot using real-world datasets in comparison with state-of-the-art reordering algorithms. Our results show that Groot significantly enhances the computational intensity of SpMM and SDDMM on TCs, delivering the average speedups of 1.8× and 2.0×, respectively. Furthermore, the performance gains extend broadly to sparse computations on CUDA cores and GNN systems.
items.abstract_zh: 稀疏矩阵乘法在科学计算和机器学习应用中至关重要。最近的研究在张量核心 (TC) 上卸载稀疏操作，例如稀疏矩阵-矩阵乘法 (SpMM) 和采样稠密矩阵乘法 (SDDMM)，以提高性能。然而，它们的性能往往受到矩阵固有的稀疏性和不规则性的限制。在本文中，我们发现行重新排序可以潜在地改善 TC 上的稀疏操作，但现有的重新排序技术存在局限性，阻碍了其有效性。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 Groot，一种以图为中心的树行重新排序算法。 Groot 的目标是最小化矩阵上的行差异，这被证明是一个 NP 难问题。为了逼近最优解，Groot 首先通过构造 k 最近邻图来捕获稀疏矩阵的局部结构，其中行表示为节点。然后，它从构造的图中提取最小生成树以进行全局结构优化。最后，Groot 遍历提取的树以获得最终的排序。我们使用真实世界的数据集与最先进的重新排序算法进行比较来评估 Groot。我们的结果表明，Groot 显着增强了 TC 上 SpMM 和 SDDMM 的计算强度，平均加速分别为 1.8 倍和 2.0 倍。此外，性能提升广泛扩展到 CUDA 核心和 GNN 系统上的稀疏计算。

items.title: Phantom: Virtualizing Switch Register Resources for Accurate Sketch-based Network Measurement.
items.abstract: Sketches have proven to be useful for measuring traffic. They store measurement results in the registers of data plane switches. However, they suffer from the short of switch register resources, limiting their measurement accuracy.
items.abstract_zh: 事实证明，草图对于测量流量非常有用。它们将测量结果存储在数据平面交换机的寄存器中。然而，它们缺乏开关寄存器资源，限制了它们的测量精度。

items.title: Themis: Finding Imbalance Failures in Distributed File Systems via a Load Variance Model.
items.abstract: A distributed file system (DFS) is a file system that spans across multiple file servers or multiple locations. The load balancing mechanism in a DFS is crucial, as it optimizes resource utilization across all nodes and improves response times. However, incorrect load scheduling or implementation errors in load balancing algorithms can lead to system imbalance, hang-ups, and even crashes. Such imbalance failures may be critical and pose a significant threat to the availability and security of distributed file systems.
items.abstract_zh: 分布式文件系统 (DFS) 是跨多个文件服务器或多个位置的文件系统。 DFS 中的负载平衡机制至关重要，因为它优化了所有节点的资源利用率并缩短了响应时间。然而，不正确的负载调度或负载均衡算法的实现错误可能会导致系统不平衡、挂起，甚至崩溃。这种不平衡故障可能很严重，并对分布式文件系统的可用性和安全性构成重大威胁。

items.title: Marlin: Enabling High-Throughput Congestion Control Testing in Large-Scale Networks.
items.abstract: Cloud providers require high-throughput traffic to test the effectiveness of congestion control (CC) configurations (i.e., CC algorithm selection and their parameter settings) in networks. A network tester capable of evaluating CC configurations needs to fulfill the following requirements: (R1) Capable of generating traffic with CC behaviors. (R2) Ability to customize CC algorithms. (R3) High throughput CC traffic generation. However, existing network testers fail to meet these requirements simultaneously. The paper presents Marlin, a novel high-throughput network tester designed for CC evaluation. Marlin leverages a high-throughput, low-programmability device to amplify the traffic generated by a low-throughput, high-programmability device. The low-throughput device is responsible for complex computational tasks, such as running CC and flow scheduling algorithms, and communicates with the high-throughput device at a high frequency using small packets to instruct it to generate high-throughput traffic with CC behaviors. This hybrid approach allows for customizable, high-throughput CC testing. Our experiments demonstrate that Marlin can accurately emulate CC behaviors and replicate real-world scenarios. Marlin can generate 1.2 Tbps of CC traffic using a single programmable switch pipeline and one 100 Gbps port of an FPGA NIC, supporting up to 65,536 concurrent flows.
items.abstract_zh: 云提供商需要高吞吐量流量来测试网络中拥塞控制 (CC) 配置（即 CC 算法选择及其参数设置）的有效性。能够评估 CC 配置的网络测试仪需要满足以下要求： (R1) 能够生成具有 CC 行为的流量。 (R2) 能够定制CC算法。 (R3) 高吞吐量 CC 流量生成。然而，现有的网络测试仪无法同时满足这些要求。本文介绍了 Marlin，一种专为 CC 评估而设计的新型高吞吐量网络测试仪。 Marlin 利用高吞吐量、低可编程性设备来放大低吞吐量、高可编程性设备生成的流量。低吞吐量设备负责复杂的计算任务，例如运行CC和流调度算法，并使用小数据包与高吞吐量设备进行高频通信，指示其通过CC行为生成高吞吐量流量。这种混合方法允许进行可定制的高通量 CC 测试。我们的实验表明，Marlin 可以准确地模拟 CC 行为并复制现实世界的场景。 Marlin 可以使用单个可编程交换机管道和 FPGA NIC 的一个 100 Gbps 端口生成 1.2 Tbps 的 CC 流量，支持多达 65,536 个并发流。

items.title: Seal: Towards Diverse Specification Inference for Linux Interfaces from Security Patches.
items.abstract: Linux utilizes interfaces as communication protocols across different subsystems while ensuring manageability. These interfaces standardize interactions between various subsystems; however, the absence of complete calling contexts can result in the mishandling of data from other entities, i.e., interaction data, thus incurring vulnerabilities. Even worse, the effectiveness of static bug detectors could be severely hindered due to the lack of interface specifications. Previous solutions, seeking to automate the inference of interface specifications, are tailored to a subset of the interaction data behavior and, hence are deficient in generalizability.
items.abstract_zh: Linux 利用接口作为不同子系统之间的通信协议，同时确保可管理性。这些接口标准化了各个子系统之间的交互；然而，缺乏完整的调用上下文可能会导致对来自其他实体的数据（即交互数据）的错误处理，从而导致漏洞。更糟糕的是，由于缺乏接口规范，静态错误检测器的有效性可能会受到严重阻碍。以前的解决方案寻求自动化接口规范的推断，是针对交互数据行为的子集定制的，因此缺乏通用性。

items.title: Towards VM Rescheduling Optimization Through Deep Reinforcement Learning.
items.abstract: Modern industry-scale data centers need to manage a large number of virtual machines (VMs). Due to the continual creation and release of VMs, many small resource fragments are scattered across physical machines (PMs). To handle these fragments, data centers periodically reschedule some VMs to alternative PMs, a practice commonly referred to as VM rescheduling. Despite the increasing importance of VM rescheduling as data centers grow in size, the problem remains understudied. We first show that, unlike most combinatorial optimization tasks, the inference time of VM rescheduling algorithms significantly influences their performance, due to dynamic VM state changes during this period. This causes existing methods to scale poorly. Therefore, we develop a reinforcement learning system for VM rescheduling, VMR2L, which incorporates a set of customized techniques, such as a two-stage framework that accommodates diverse constraints and workload conditions, a feature extraction module that captures relational information specific to rescheduling, as well as a risk-seeking evaluation enabling users to optimize the trade-off between latency and accuracy. We conduct extensive experiments with data from an industry-scale data center. Our results show that VMR2L can achieve a performance comparable to the optimal solution but with a running time of seconds. Code12 and datasets3 are open-sourced.
items.abstract_zh: 现代行业规模的数据中心需要管理大量虚拟机 (VM)。由于VM的不断创建和释放，许多小的资源碎片分散在物理机（PM）上。为了处理这些碎片，数据中心定期将一些虚拟机重新调度到替代的 PM，这种做法通常称为虚拟机重新调度。尽管随着数据中心规模的扩大，虚拟机重新调度变得越来越重要，但这个问题仍然没有得到充分研究。我们首先表明，与大多数组合优化任务不同，VM 重新调度算法的推理时间会显着影响其性能，因为在此期间 VM 状态会发生动态变化。这导致现有方法扩展性较差。因此，我们开发了一个用于VM重新调度的强化学习系统VMR2L，它结合了一组定制技术，例如适应不同约束和工作负载条件的两阶段框架、捕获特定于重新调度的关系信息的特征提取模块，以及使用户能够优化延迟和准确性之间的权衡的风险寻求评估。我们利用来自行业规模数据中心的数据进行了广泛的实验。我们的结果表明，VMR2L 可以实现与最优解决方案相当的性能，但运行时间为秒。 Code12 和 datasets3 是开源的。

items.title: PET: Proactive Demotion for Efficient Tiered Memory Management.
items.abstract: Tiered memory is a promising approach for increasing main-memory capacity at a lower cost by using DRAM as the upper tier (fast memory) and slower-but-cheap byte-addressable memory as the lower tier (slow memory). A proactive demotion, one of the ways to use tiered memory efficiently, demotes cold data to slow memory even when fast memory has sufficient free space. Prior works have utilized proactive demotion to reduce the high cost of main memory by reducing applications' resident set size in fast memory. Further, proactive demotion helps mitigate severe performance degradation caused by fast memory shortages when there is a spike in demand for hot data. Still, we observe that leveraging memory access locality within the allocation units of applications enables larger fast-memory savings with lower system overhead.
items.abstract_zh: 分层内存是一种很有前途的方法，通过使用 DRAM 作为上层（快速内存），使用较慢但便宜的字节可寻址内存作为下层（慢速内存），以较低的成本增加主内存容量。主动降级是有效使用分层内存的方法之一，即使快速内存有足够的可用空间，也会将冷数据降级为慢速内存。先前的工作已经利用主动降级来通过减少应用程序在快速存储器中的驻留集大小来降低主存储器的高成本。此外，当热数据需求激增时，主动降级有助于缓解由于快速内存短缺而导致的严重性能下降。尽管如此，我们仍然观察到，利用应用程序分配单元内的内存访问局部性可以以更低的系统开销实现更大的快速内存节省。

items.title: SpInfer: Leveraging Low-Level Sparsity for Efficient Large Language Model Inference on GPUs.
items.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities, but their immense scale poses significant challenges in terms of both memory and computational costs. While unstructured pruning offers promising solutions by introducing sparsity to reduce resource requirements, realizing its benefits in LLM inference remains elusive. This is primarily due to the storage overhead of indexing non-zero elements and the inefficiency of sparse matrix multiplication (SpMM) kernels at low sparsity levels (around 50%). In this paper, we present SpInfer, a high-performance framework tailored for sparsified LLM inference on GPUs. SpInfer introduces Tensor-Core-Aware Bitmap Encoding (TCA-BME), a novel sparse format that minimizes indexing overhead by leveraging efficient bitmap-based indexing, optimized for GPU Tensor Core architectures. Furthermore, SpInfer integrates an optimized SpMM kernel with Shared Memory Bitmap Decoding (SMBD) and asynchronous pipeline design to enhance computational efficiency. Experimental results show that SpInfer significantly outperforms state-of-the-art SpMM implementations (up to 2.14× and 2.27× over Flash-LLM and SparTA, respectively) across a range of sparsity levels (30% to 70%), with substantial improvements in both memory efficiency and end-to-end inference speed (up to 1.58×). SpInfer outperforms highly optimized cuBLAS at sparsity levels as low as 30%, marking the first effective translation of unstructured pruning's theoretical advantages into practical performance gains for LLM inference.
items.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 已展现出非凡的功能，但其巨大的规模在内存和计算成本方面提出了重大挑战。虽然非结构化剪枝通过引入稀疏性来减少资源需求，提供了有前途的解决方案，但实现其在 LLM 推理中的好处仍然难以实现。这主要是由于索引非零元素的存储开销以及稀疏矩阵乘法 (SpMM) 内核在低稀疏级别（大约 50%）下的低效率。在本文中，我们提出了 SpInfer，这是一个专为 GPU 上的稀疏 LLM 推理而定制的高性能框架。 SpInfer 推出了 Tensor-Core-Aware 位图编码 (TCA-BME)，这是一种新颖的稀疏格式，它通过利用高效的基于位图的索引来最大限度地减少索引开销，并针对 GPU Tensor Core 架构进行了优化。此外，SpInfer将优化的SpMM内核与共享内存位图解码（SMBD）和异步管道设计集成在一起，以提高计算效率。实验结果表明，SpInfer 在一系列稀疏级别（30% 到 70%）上显着优于最先进的 SpMM 实现（分别比 Flash-LLM 和 SparTA 提高了 2.14 倍和 2.27 倍），并且内存效率和端到端推理速度都得到了显着改进（高达 1.58 倍）。 SpInfer 在稀疏度水平低至 30% 时优于高度优化的 cuBLAS，这标志着非结构化剪枝的理论优势首次有效转化为 LLM 推理的实际性能增益。

items.title: TUNA: Tuning Unstable and Noisy Cloud Applications.
items.abstract: Autotuning plays a pivotal role in optimizing the performance of systems, particularly in large-scale cloud deployments. One of the main challenges in performing autotuning in the cloud arises from performance variability. We first investigate the extent to which noise slows autotuning and find that as little as 5% noise can lead to a 2.5x slowdown in converging to the best-performing configuration. We measure the magnitude of noise in cloud computing settings and find that while some components (CPU, disk) have almost no performance variability, there are still sources of significant variability (caches, memory). Furthermore, variability leads to autotuning finding unstable configurations. As many as 63.3% of the configurations selected as "best" during tuning can have their performance degrade by 30% or more when deployed. Using this as motivation, we propose a novel approach to improve the efficiency of autotuning systems by (a) detecting and removing outlier configurations and (b) using ML-based approaches to provide a more stable true signal of de-noised experiment results to the optimizer. The resulting system, TUNA (Tuning Unstable and Noisy Cloud Applications) enables faster convergence and robust configurations. Tuning PostgreSQL running mssales, an enterprise production workload, we find that TUNA can lead to 1.88x lower running time on average with 2.58x lower standard deviation compared to traditional sampling methodologies.
items.abstract_zh: 自动调优在优化系统性能方面发挥着关键作用，特别是在大规模云部署中。在云中执行自动调整的主要挑战之一来自性能变化。我们首先研究了噪声在多大程度上减慢了自动调节速度，发现低至 5% 的噪声就可能导致收敛到最佳性能配置时速度减慢 2.5 倍。我们测量了云计算设置中的噪声大小，发现虽然某些组件（CPU、磁盘）几乎没有性能变化，但仍然存在显着变化的来源（缓存、内存）。此外，可变性会导致自动调整发现不稳定的配置。在调优过程中被选为“最佳”的配置中，多达 63.3% 的配置在部署时性能会下降 30% 或更多。以此为动机，我们提出了一种新颖的方法来提高自动调节系统的效率，方法是（a）检测和删除异常配置，以及（b）使用基于机器学习的方法向优化器提供更稳定的去噪实验结果的真实信号。由此产生的系统 TUNA（调整不稳定和嘈杂的云应用程序）可实现更快的收敛和稳健的配置。通过对运行 mssales（一种企业生产工作负载）的 PostgreSQL 进行调优，我们发现与传统采样方法相比，TUNA 可以将运行时间平均缩短 1.88 倍，标准差降低 2.58 倍。

items.title: Understanding and Detecting SQL Function Bugs: Using Simple Boundary Arguments to Trigger Hundreds of DBMS Bugs.
items.abstract: Built-in SQL functions are crucial in Database Management Systems (DBMSs), supporting various operations and computations across multiple data types. They are essential for querying, data transformation, and aggregation. Despite their importance, the bugs in SQL functions have caused widespread problems in the real world, from system failures to arbitrary code execution. However, the understanding of the bug characteristics is limited. More importantly, conventional function testing methods struggle to generate semantically correct SQL test cases, while DBMS testing efforts are hard to measure built-in SQL functions.
items.abstract_zh: 内置 SQL 函数在数据库管理系统 (DBMS) 中至关重要，支持跨多种数据类型的各种操作和计算。它们对于查询、数据转换和聚合至关重要。尽管它们很重要，但 SQL 函数中的错误在现实世界中引起了广泛的问题，从系统故障到任意代码执行。然而，对 bug 特征的了解是有限的。更重要的是，传统的函数测试方法很难生成语义上正确的 SQL 测试用例，而 DBMS 测试工作很难衡量内置的 SQL 函数。

items.title: RoboRebound: Multi-Robot System Defense with Bounded-Time Interaction.
items.abstract: Byzantine Fault Tolerance (BFT) is a classic technique for defending distributed systems against a wide range of faults and attacks. However, existing solutions are designed for systems where nodes can interact only by exchanging messages. They are not directly applicable to systems where nodes have sensors and actuators and can also interact in the physical world - perhaps by blocking each other's path or by crashing into each other.
items.abstract_zh: 拜占庭容错（BFT）是一种保护分布式系统免受各种故障和攻击的经典技术。然而，现有的解决方案是为节点只能通过交换消息进行交互的系统而设计的。它们并不直接适用于节点具有传感器和执行器的系统，并且还可以在物理世界中进行交互——可能通过阻塞彼此的路径或相互碰撞。

items.title: Fast State Restoration in LLM Serving with HCache.
items.abstract: The growing complexity of LLM usage today, e.g., multi-round conversation and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), makes contextual states (i.e., KV cache) reusable across user requests. Given the capacity constraints of GPU memory, only a limited number of contexts can be cached on GPU for reusing. Existing inference systems typically evict part of the KV cache and restore it by recomputing it from the original tokens or offloading it to host storage for later retrieval, both of which introduce substantial computational or I/O overheads.
items.abstract_zh: 如今，LLM 使用的复杂性不断增加，例如多轮对话和检索增强生成 (RAG)，使得上下文状态（即 KV 缓存）可以跨用户请求重用。考虑到 GPU 内存的容量限制，只有有限数量的上下文可以缓存在 GPU 上以供重用。现有的推理系统通常会逐出部分 KV 缓存，并通过从原始令牌重新计算它或将其卸载到主机存储以供以后检索来恢复它，这两者都会带来大量的计算或 I/O 开销。

items.title: Collaborative Text Editing with Eg-walker: Better, Faster, Smaller.
items.abstract: Collaborative text editing algorithms allow several users to concurrently modify a text file, and automatically merge concurrent edits into a consistent state. Existing algorithms fall in two categories: Operational Transformation (OT) algorithms are slow to merge files that have diverged substantially due to offline editing; CRDTs are slow to load and consume a lot of memory. We introduce Eg-walker, a collaboration algorithm for text that avoids these weaknesses. Compared to existing CRDTs, it consumes an order of magnitude less memory in the steady state, and loading a document from disk is orders of magnitude faster. Compared to OT, merging long-running branches is orders of magnitude faster. In the worst case, the merging performance of Eg-walker is comparable with existing CRDT algorithms. Eg-walker can be used everywhere CRDTs are used, including peer-to-peer systems without a central server. By offering performance that is competitive with centralised algorithms, our result paves the way towards the widespread adoption of peer-to-peer collaboration software.
items.abstract_zh: 协作文本编辑算法允许多个用户同时修改文本文件，并自动将并发编辑合并为一致状态。现有算法分为两类：操作转换 (OT) 算法合并由于离线编辑而出现严重分歧的文件的速度很慢； CRDT 加载速度慢并且消耗大量内存。我们引入了 Eg-walker，一种避免这些弱点的文本协作算法。与现有的 CRDT 相比，它在稳定状态下消耗的内存要少一个数量级，并且从磁盘加载文档的速度要快几个数量级。与 OT 相比，合并长时间运行的分支要快几个数量级。在最坏的情况下，Eg-walker的合并性能与现有的CRDT算法相当。 Eg-walker 可以在任何使用 CRDT 的地方使用，包括没有中央服务器的点对点系统。通过提供与集中式算法竞争的性能，我们的结果为点对点协作软件的广泛采用铺平了道路。

items.title: Optimizing Task Scheduling in Cloud VMs with Accurate vCPU Abstraction.
items.abstract: The paper shows that task scheduling in Cloud VMs hasn't evolved quickly to handle the dynamic vCPU resources. The existing vCPU abstraction cannot accurately depict the vCPU dynamics in capacity, activity, and topology, and these mismatches can mislead the scheduler, causing performance degradation and system anomalies. The paper proposes a novel solution, vSched, which probes accurate vCPU abstraction through a set of lightweight microbenchmarks (vProbers) without modifying the hypervisor, and leverages the probed information to optimize task scheduling in cloud VMs with three new techniques: biased vCPU selection, intra-VM harvesting, and relaxed work conservation. Our evaluation of vSched's implementation in x86 Linux Kernel demonstrates that it can effectively improve both system throughput and workload latency across various VM types in the dynamic multi-cloud environment.
items.abstract_zh: 该论文表明，云虚拟机中的任务调度尚未快速发展以处理动态 vCPU 资源。现有的 vCPU 抽象无法准确描述 vCPU 的容量、活动和拓扑动态，这些不匹配可能会误导调度程序，导致性能下降和系统异常。本文提出了一种新颖的解决方案 vSched，它通过一组轻量级微基准测试 (vProbers) 来探测准确的 vCPU 抽象，而无需修改虚拟机管理程序，并利用探测到的信息通过三种新技术来优化云虚拟机中的任务调度：偏向 vCPU 选择、虚拟机内部收获和宽松的工作保护。我们对 x86 Linux 内核中 vSched 实施的评估表明，它可以有效提高动态多云环境中各种虚拟机类型的系统吞吐量和工作负载延迟。

items.title: MetaHG: Enhancing HGNN Systems Leveraging Advanced Metapath Graph Abstraction.
items.abstract: Heterogeneous Graph Neural Networks (HGNNs) are pivotal for extracting semantic and structural information from heterogeneous graphs. Traditional HGNN implementations often grapple with the challenges of excessive metapath instances, requiring substantial storage or incurring high instance-matching overhead. These methods typically suffer from redundant instance encoding and costly semantic graph construction. Addressing these issues, we introduce an advanced Metapath Graph (MG) abstraction that encapsulates the structural information of all metapath instances within a compact representation. This approach significantly reduces storage demands, eliminates redundant instance encodings, and foregoes the need for constructing semantic graphs, thereby facilitating rapid HGNN inference. Our software-based system, MetaHG, leverages layerwise encoding and aggregation to avoid redundancies without the necessity of semantic graphs. It incorporates a fast, lightweight partitioning method to efficiently manage large graphs. Distinctively, MetaHG seamlessly integrates with both dynamic HGNNs and homogeneous GNNs, unlike conventional systems. Comparative evaluations demonstrate that MetaHG surpasses the state-of-the-art BFS- and DFS-based HGNN systems, MAGNN and the software implementation of MetaNMP, by 42.5× and 4.53×, respectively, on average.
items.abstract_zh: 异构图神经网络（HGNN）对于从异构图中提取语义和结构信息至关重要。传统的 HGNN 实现经常面临元路径实例过多的挑战，需要大量存储或产生较高的实例匹配开销。这些方法通常遭受冗余实例编码和昂贵的语义图构建的困扰。为了解决这些问题，我们引入了高级元路径图（MG）抽象，它将所有元路径实例的结构信息封装在一个紧凑的表示中。这种方法显着减少了存储需求，消除了冗余的实例编码，并放弃了构建语义图的需要，从而促进了快速 HGNN 推理。我们基于软件的系统 MetaHG 利用分层编码和聚合来避免冗余，而无需语义图。它采用快速、轻量级的分区方法来有效管理大型图。与传统系统不同，MetaHG 与动态 HGNN 和同构 GNN 无缝集成。比较评估表明，MetaHG 平均分别超过了最先进的基于 BFS 和 DFS 的 HGNN 系统、MAGNN 和 MetaNMP 的软件实现 42.5 倍和 4.53 倍。

items.title: FlowCheck: Decoupling Checkpointing and Training of Large-Scale Models.
items.abstract: Checkpointing is becoming a hotspot of interest in both academia and industry as the primary fault-tolerance method for large model training. However, existing checkpoint designs are tightly coupled with the training process, leading to interruptions that reduce overall training efficiency. To reduce the impact of checkpoints on training, this paper presents FlowCheck, a novel checkpointing system that decouples checkpoint operations from the training process, enabling checkpoint saving without blocking the training. Specifically, FlowCheck updates the checkpoints by extracting complete gradient information from the network traffic of normal training. FlowCheck deploys a traffic-mirroring network to support this design. To utilize mirrored traffic for checkpointing operations, two key challenges need to be addressed. First, we need to achieve precise identification and extraction of gradient packets from training traffic. Second, the transmission on the mirror link is unreliable due to its inability to trigger retransmission upon packet loss. Through two key designs: (1) packet-counting-based traffic identification, and (2) packet redundancy recovery mechanism, FlowCheck implements an efficient checkpointing system using the existing training network and solves the above two challenges. Experiments and estimations verify that FlowCheck achieves checkpoint operations with zero impact on training, and demonstrate that FlowCheck achieves over 98% effective training time under practical fault conditions.
items.abstract_zh: 作为大型模型训练的主要容错方法，检查点正在成为学术界和工业界关注的热点。然而，现有的检查点设计与训练过程紧密耦合，导致中断，从而降低整体训练效率。为了减少检查点对训练的影响，本文提出了 FlowCheck，这是一种新颖的检查点系统，它将检查点操作与训练过程解耦，从而能够在不阻塞训练的情况下保存检查点。具体来说，FlowCheck通过从正常训练的网络流量中提取完整的梯度信息来更新检查点。 FlowCheck 部署流量镜像网络来支持此设计。为了利用镜像流量进行检查点操作，需要解决两个关键挑战。首先，我们需要实现训练流量中梯度包的精确识别和提取。其次，镜像链路上的传输不可靠，丢包时无法触发重传。 FlowCheck通过两个关键设计：（1）基于数据包计数的流量识别，（2）数据包冗余恢复机制，利用现有的训练网络实现了高效的检查点系统，并解决了上述两个挑战。实验和估算验证了FlowCheck实现了对训练零影响的检查点操作，并证明FlowCheck在实际故障情况下实现了98%以上的有效训练时间。

items.title: Solid State Drive Targeted Memory-Efficient Indexing for Universal I/O Patterns and Fragmentation Degrees.
items.abstract: Thanks to the advance of device scaling technologies, the capacity of SSDs is rapidly increasing. Such increase, however, comes at the cost of a huge index table requiring large DRAM. To provide reasonable performance with less DRAM, various index structures exploiting locality and regularity of I/O references have been proposed. However, they provide deteriorated performance depending on I/O patterns and storage fragmentation. This paper proposes a novel approximate index structure, called AppL, which combines memory-efficient approximate indices and an LSM-tree that has an append-only and sorted nature. AppL reduces the index size to 6-8-bits per entry, which is considerably smaller than the typical index structures requiring 32-64-bits, and maintains such high memory efficiency irrespective of locality and fragmentation. By alleviating memory pressure, AppL achieves 33.6-72.4% shorter read latency and 28.4%-83.4% higher I/O throughput than state-of-the-art techniques.
items.abstract_zh: 由于设备扩展技术的进步，SSD的容量正在迅速增加。然而，这种增加是以需要大量 DRAM 的巨大索引表为代价的。为了用更少的 DRAM 提供合理的性能，已经提出了利用 I/O 引用的局部性和规律性的各种索引结构。然而，它们的性能会因 I/O 模式和存储碎片而降低。本文提出了一种新颖的近似索引结构，称为 AppL，它结合了内存高效的近似索引和具有仅追加和排序性质的 LSM 树。 AppL 将索引大小减少到每个条目 6-8 位，这比需要 32-64 位的典型索引结构要小得多，并且无论局部性和碎片如何，都可以保持如此高的内存效率。通过减轻内存压力，AppL 与最先进的技术相比，读取延迟缩短了 33.6-72.4%，I/O 吞吐量提高了 28.4%-83.4%。

items.title: A House United Within Itself: SLO-Awareness for On-Premises Containerized ML Inference Clusters via Faro.
items.abstract: This paper tackles the challenge of running multiple ML inference jobs (models) under time-varying workloads, on a constrained on-premises production cluster. Our system Faro takes in latency Service Level Objectives (SLOs) for each job, auto-distills them into utility functions, "sloppifies" these utility functions to make them amenable to mathematical optimization, automatically predicts workload via probabilistic prediction, and dynamically makes implicit cross-job resource allocations, in order to satisfy cluster-wide objectives, e.g., total utility, fairness, and other hybrid variants. A major challenge Faro tackles is that using precise utilities and high-fidelity predictors, can be too slow (and in a sense too precise!) for the fast adaptation we require. Faro's solution is to "sloppify" (relax) its multiple design components to achieve fast adaptation without overly degrading solution quality. Faro is implemented in a stack consisting of Ray Serve running atop a Kubernetes cluster. Trace-driven cluster deployments show that Faro achieves 2.3×-23× lower SLO violations compared to state-of-the-art systems.
items.abstract_zh: 本文解决了在受限的本地生产集群上在时变工作负载下运行多个 ML 推理作业（模型）的挑战。我们的系统 Faro 接收每个作业的延迟服务级别目标 (SLO)，自动将它们提炼为效用函数，“简化”这些效用函数以使它们适合数学优化，通过概率预测自动预测工作负载，并动态进行隐式跨作业资源分配，以满足集群范围的目标，例如总效用、公平性和其他混合变体。 Faro 解决的一个主要挑战是，使用精确的实用程序和高保真度预测器对于我们所需的快速适应来说可能太慢（并且在某种意义上太精确！）。 Faro 的解决方案是“马虎”（放松）其多个设计组件，以实现快速适应，而不会过度降低解决方案质量。 Faro 在由运行在 Kubernetes 集群之上的 Ray Serve 组成的堆栈中实现。跟踪驱动的集群部署表明，与最先进的系统相比，Faro 的 SLO 违规率降低了 2.3 倍-23 倍。

items.title: Introspective Congestion Control for Consistent High Performance.
items.abstract: The congestion control (CC) algorithm is expected to achieve consistent high performance under different network environments. Traditionally, classic CCs are designed with the methodology of inferring path conditions to guide the rate adjustment. However, this methodology suffers from wrong path condition inferences in certain cases, which mislead the rate adjustment and lead to performance degradation. To avoid wrong path condition inferences, we develop the projection-based introspective method and design the introspective congestion control (ICC) algorithm in this paper. Specifically, the rate adjustment rules are designed to possess a specialized profile such that the projection of the profile can be distinguished under unchanged path conditions. In this way, the projection, which can be distinguished from the time series of delay signals in the frequency domain, facilitates ICC to extract more information for path condition inferences. Consequently, with the introspection on the projection, ICC can avoid being misled by wrong path condition inferences and thus achieve consistent high performance under different conditions. The advantages of ICC are confirmed through extensive experiments conducted on various locally emulated scenarios, global testbeds over the Internet, and the Alipay platform.
items.abstract_zh: 拥塞控制（CC）算法有望在不同的网络环境下实现一致的高性能。传统上，经典的CC是通过推断路径条件来指导速率调整的方法来设计的。然而，这种方法在某些情况下会受到错误的路径条件推断，从而误导速率调整并导致性能下降。为了避免错误的路径条件推断，我们在本文中开发了基于投影的内省方法并设计了内省拥塞控制（ICC）算法。具体地，速率调整规则被设计为具有专门的轮廓，使得在不变的路径条件下可以区分轮廓的投影。这样，可以与频域延迟信号的时间序列区分开来的投影，有利于ICC提取更多信息用于路径条件推断。因此，通过对投影的内省，ICC可以避免被错误的路径条件推断所误导，从而在不同条件下获得一致的高性能。通过在各种本地模拟场景、互联网全球测试平台和支付宝平台上进行的大量实验，证实了 ICC 的优势。

items.title: Serverless Cold Starts and Where to Find Them.
items.abstract: This paper analyzes a month-long trace of 85 billion user requests and 11.9 million cold starts from Huawei's serverless cloud platform. Our analysis spans workloads from five data centers. We focus on cold starts and provide a comprehensive examination of the underlying factors influencing the number and duration of cold starts. These factors include trigger types, request synchronicity, runtime languages, and function resource allocations. We investigate components of cold starts, including pod allocation time, code and dependency deployment time, and scheduling delays, and examine their relationships with runtime languages, trigger types, and resource allocation. We introduce pod utility ratio to measure the pod's useful lifetime relative to its cold start time, giving a more complete picture of cold starts, and see that some pods with long cold start times have longer useful lifetimes. Our findings reveal the complexity and multifaceted origins of the number, duration, and characteristics of cold starts, driven by differences in trigger types, runtime languages, and function resource allocations. For example, cold starts in Region 1 take up to 7 seconds, dominated by dependency deployment time and scheduling. In Region 2, cold starts take up to 3 seconds and are dominated by pod allocation time. Based on this, we identify opportunities to reduce the number and duration of cold starts using strategies for multi-region scheduling. Finally, we suggest directions for future research to address these challenges and enhance the performance of serverless cloud platforms.
items.abstract_zh: 本文分析了华为无服务器云平台长达一个月的850亿次用户请求和1190万次冷启动的跟踪。我们的分析涵盖五个数据中心的工作负载。我们专注于冷启动，并对影响冷启动次数和持续时间的潜在因素进行全面检查。这些因素包括触发器类型、请求同步性、运行时语言和函数资源分配。我们研究了冷启动的组成部分，包括 Pod 分配时间、代码和依赖项部署时间以及调度延迟，并检查它们与运行时语言、触发器类型和资源分配的关系。我们引入 Pod 利用率来衡量 Pod 相对于其冷启动时间的使用寿命，从而更全面地了解冷启动情况，并发现一些冷启动时间较长的 Pod 具有更长的使用寿命。我们的研究结果揭示了冷启动的数量、持续时间和特征的复杂性和多方面起源，这是由触发器类型、运行时语言和函数资源分配的差异驱动的。例如，区域 1 中的冷启动最多需要 7 秒，主要取决于依赖项部署时间和调度。在区域 2 中，冷启动最多需要 3 秒，并且主要由 Pod 分配时间决定。基于此，我们找到了使用多区域调度策略来减少冷启动次数和持续时间的机会。最后，我们提出了未来研究的方向，以应对这些挑战并提高无服务器云平台的性能。

items.title: Heimdall: Optimizing Storage I/O Admission with Extensive Machine Learning Pipeline.
items.abstract: This paper introduces Heimdall, a highly accurate and efficient machine learning-powered I/O admission policy for flash storage, designed to operate in a black-box manner. We make domain-specific innovations in various ML stages by introducing accurate period-based labeling, 3-stage noise filtering, in-depth feature engineering, and fine-grained tuning, which together improve the decision accuracy from 67% up to 93%. We perform various deployment optimizations to reach a sub-μs inference latency and a small, 28KB, memory overhead. With 500 unbiased random experiments derived from production traces, we show Heimdall delivers 15-35% lower average I/O latency compared to the state of the art and up to 2x faster to a baseline. Heimdall is ready for user-level, in-kernel, and distributed deployments.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Heimdall，这是一种高度准确且高效的基于机器学习的闪存 I/O 准入策略，旨在以黑盒方式运行。我们通过引入精确的基于周期的标记、三级噪声过滤、深入的特征工程和细粒度的调整，在各个机器学习阶段进行了特定领域的创新，将决策准确率从 67% 提高到 93%。我们执行各种部署优化，以达到亚微秒的推理延迟和较小的 28KB 内存开销。通过从生产跟踪中得出的 500 个无偏差随机实验，我们发现与现有技术相比，Heimdall 的平均 I/O 延迟降低了 15-35%，并且速度比基线快了 2 倍。 Heimdall 已准备好进行用户级、内核内和分布式部署。

items.title: Daredevil: Rescue Your Flash Storage from Inflexible Kernel Storage Stack.
items.abstract: Existing kernel storage stacks for NVMe SSDs struggle to address performance interference between I/O requests from tenants with different SLAs, leading to the multi-tenancy issue. Addressing this requires separating their I/O requests within the NVMe I/O queues (NQs). However, our analysis reveals that the static CPU core-NQ bindings of current storage stacks restrict their flexibility to achieve this goal.
items.abstract_zh: 现有的 NVMe SSD 内核存储堆栈难以解决具有不同 SLA 的租户 I/O 请求之间的性能干扰，从而导致多租户问题。解决这个问题需要在 NVMe I/O 队列 (NQ) 中分离它们的 I/O 请求。然而，我们的分析表明，当前存储堆栈的静态 CPU 核心-NQ 绑定限制了它们实现这一目标的灵活性。

items.title: ParallelEVM: Operation-Level Concurrent Transaction Execution for EVM-Compatible Blockchains.
items.abstract: Blockchain systems, especially EVM-compatible ones that serially execute transactions, face a significant limitation in throughput. One promising solution is concurrent transaction execution, which accelerates transaction processing and increases the overall throughput. However, existing concurrency control algorithms fail to obtain adequate speedups in high-contention blockchain workloads, primarily due to their transaction-level conflict resolution strategies.
items.abstract_zh: 区块链系统，尤其是串行执行交易的 EVM 兼容系统，在吞吐量方面面临着重大限制。一种有前途的解决方案是并发事务执行，它可以加速事务处理并提高总体吞吐量。然而，现有的并发控制算法无法在高争用的区块链工作负载中获得足够的加速，这主要是由于其事务级冲突解决策略。

items.title: Jupiter: Pushing Speed and Scalability Limitations for Subgraph Matching on Multi-GPUs.
items.abstract: Graph pattern matching (GPM) aims to find subgraphs isomorphic to user-specified patterns within a large graph. Due to its ability to reveal potential relationships among entities in complex networks, it is widely applied in various fields, such as mining molecular structures in bioinformatics, detecting fraud in cloud-based e-commerce, and querying knowledge graphs in large language model. The explosion of data brought by the AI era has rendered traditional GPM systems inadequate for real-world needs. Due to the intricate data dependencies of GPM tasks, most SOTA GPM systems currently have limited scalability and performance, they perform well in small graph mining with single node but cannot scale to modern clusters with GPU acceleration. This paper introduces JUPITER, the first system capable of matching patterns on large graph across multi-node GPU clusters, which can handle graphs 10 times larger than SOTAs with the same memory resources. Its core principle is to delegate computation to the data-residing processing unit rather than pulling data to the computation location, which greatly improves communication efficiency. Experimental results show that JUPITER can reduce communication volume by two orders of magnitude compared to SOTA subgraph matching systems, achieving up to 120× speedup and an average of 21.5× speedup.
items.abstract_zh: 图模式匹配（GPM）旨在在大图中找到与用户指定模式同构的子图。由于其能够揭示复杂网络中实体之间的潜在关系，因此被广泛应用于各个领域，例如生物信息学中的分子结构挖掘、基于云的电子商务中的欺诈检测以及大语言模型中的知识图查询。人工智能时代带来的数据爆炸使得传统的GPM系统无法满足现实世界的需求。由于GPM任务复杂的数据依赖性，目前大多数SOTA GPM系统的可扩展性和性能有限，它们在单节点的小图挖掘中表现良好，但无法扩展到具有GPU加速的现代集群。本文介绍了 JUPITER，这是第一个能够跨多节点 GPU 集群在大型图上进行模式匹配的系统，在相同的内存资源下，它可以处理比 SOTA 大 10 倍的图。其核心原理是将计算委托给驻留数据的处理单元，而不是将数据拉到计算位置，这大大提高了通信效率。实验结果表明，与SOTA子图匹配系统相比，JUPITER可以将通信量减少两个数量级，实现高达120倍的加速，平均21.5倍的加速。

items.title: Understanding the Linux Kernel, Visually.
items.abstract: Understanding the Linux kernel is challenging due to its large and complex program state. While existing kernel debugging tools provide full access to kernel states at arbitrary levels of detail, developers often spend a significant amount of time sifting through redundant information to find what is truly useful. Additionally, the textual results provided by traditional debuggers are often insufficient for expressing high-dimensional information in a readable manner.
items.abstract_zh: 由于 Linux 内核的程序状态庞大且复杂，理解它是一项挑战。虽然现有的内核调试工具提供对任意详细级别的内核状态的完全访问，但开发人员经常花费大量时间筛选冗余信息以找到真正有用的信息。此外，传统调试器提供的文本结果通常不足以以可读的方式表达高维信息。

items.title: FastIOV: Fast Startup of Passthrough Network I/O Virtualization for Secure Containers.
items.abstract: Single Root I/O Virtualization (SR-IOV) technology has advanced in recent years and can simultaneously satisfy the network requirements of high data plane performance, high deployment density, and fast startup for applications in traditional containers. However, it falls short with secure containers, which have become the mainstream choice in multi-tenant clouds. SR-IOV requires secure containers to use passthrough I/O for higher data plane performance, which hinders the container startup performance and prevents its usage in time-sensitive tasks like serverless computing. In this paper, we advocate that the startup performance of SR-IOV enabled secure containers can be further boosted, making SR-IOV suitable for building a Container Network Interface (CNI) for secure containers. We first dissect the end-to-end concurrent startup process and identify three key bottlenecks that lead to the slow startup, including Virtual Function I/O device set management, Direct Memory Access memory mapping, and Virtual Function (VF) driver initialization. We then propose a CNI named FastIOV that addresses these bottlenecks through lock decomposition, unnecessary mapping skipping, decoupled zeroing, and asynchronous VF driver initialization. Our evaluation shows that FastIOV reduces the overhead of enabling SR-IOV for secure containers by 96.1%, achieving 65.7% and 75.4% reductions in the average and 99th percentile end-to-end startup time.
items.abstract_zh: 单根I/O虚拟化（SR-IOV）技术近年来发展迅速，能够同时满足传统容器中应用高数据面性能、高部署密度、快速启动的网络需求。然而，它在安全容器方面存在不足，而安全容器已成为多租户云的主流选择。 SR-IOV 要求安全容器使用直通 I/O 来获得更高的数据平面性能，这会阻碍容器的启动性能并阻止其在无服务器计算等时间敏感任务中使用。在本文中，我们主张可以进一步提升启用SR-IOV的安全容器的启动性能，使SR-IOV适合为安全容器构建容器网络接口（CNI）。我们首先剖析端到端并发启动过程，找出导致启动缓慢的三个关键瓶颈，包括虚拟功能 I/O 设备集管理、直接内存访问内存映射和虚拟功能 (VF) 驱动程序初始化。然后，我们提出了一个名为 FastIOV 的 CNI，它通过锁分解、不必要的映射跳过、解耦归零和异步 VF 驱动程序初始化来解决这些瓶颈。我们的评估表明，FastIOV 将安全容器启用 SR-IOV 的开销降低了 96.1%，平均端到端启动时间和第 99 个百分点的端到端启动时间分别减少了 65.7% 和 75.4%。

items.title: Fork: A Dual Congestion Control Loop for Small and Large Flows in Datacenters.
items.abstract: Many existing transport designs aim to deliver ultra-low latency and high bandwidth for applications in high-speed datacenter networks. However, almost all of them intertwine the control of small and large flows using the same control entity (e.g., sender or receiver) and congestion feedback signal (e.g., ECN or credit), thus bringing significant performance impairments. By contrast, we seek to decouple the rate control of small flows from that of large ones.
items.abstract_zh: 许多现有的传输设计旨在为高速数据中心网络中的应用程序提供超低延迟和高带宽。然而，几乎所有这些都使用相同的控制实体（例如发送者或接收者）和拥塞反馈信号（例如ECN或信用）来交织小流和大流的控制，从而带来显着的性能损害。相比之下，我们寻求将小流量的速率控制与大流量的速率控制脱钩。

items.title: Garbage Collection Does Not Only Collect Garbage: Piggybacking-Style Defragmentation for Deduplicated Backup Storage.
items.abstract: Deduplication is widely used in backup storage and reduces storage overhead by allowing backups to share common data chunks. However, it naturally disrupts the sequential layout of backup images, leading to fragmentation, which slows down backup restoration. Existing solutions to this issue often come with trade-offs, either reducing deduplication effectiveness or introducing significant I/O overhead.
items.abstract_zh: 重复数据删除广泛应用于备份存储，并通过允许备份共享公共数据块来减少存储开销。然而，它自然会破坏备份映像的顺序布局，导致碎片，从而减慢备份恢复速度。此问题的现有解决方案通常需要权衡，要么降低重复数据删除效率，要么引入大量 I/O 开销。

items.title: Ladon: High-Performance Multi-BFT Consensus via Dynamic Global Ordering.
items.abstract: Multi-BFT consensus runs multiple leader-based consensus instances in parallel, circumventing the leader bottleneck of a single instance. However, it contains an Achilles' heel: the need to globally order output blocks across instances. Deriving this global ordering is challenging because it must cope with different rates at which blocks are produced by instances. Prior Multi-BFT designs assign each block a global index before creation, leading to poor performance.
items.abstract_zh: 多 BFT 共识并行运行多个基于 Leader 的共识实例，规避了单个实例的 Leader 瓶颈。然而，它有一个致命弱点：需要跨实例对输出块进行全局排序。导出这种全局排序具有挑战性，因为它必须应对实例生成块的不同速率。先前的 Multi-BFT 设计在创建之前为每个块分配一个全局索引，导致性能不佳。

items.title: Atlas: Towards Real-Time Verification in Large-Scale Networks via a Native Distributed Architecture.
items.abstract: Data plane verification (DPV) can be critical in ensuring the network operates correctly. To be useful in practice, they need to be: (1) fast so as to prevent significant packet loss or security violations; (2) scalable so as to accommodate today's large-scale network architecture. Current DPV tools struggle to meet these requirements due to their centralized architecture. To be concrete, there is a bottleneck for a single-point server to perform real-time DPV tasks. Furthermore, a single-point server makes it hard to collect real-time data plane updates from every device in large-scale networks.
items.abstract_zh: 数据平面验证 (DPV) 对于确保网络正常运行至关重要。为了在实践中有用，它们需要：（1）速度快，以防止严重的数据包丢失或安全违规； (2)可扩展，以适应当今大规模的网络架构。当前的 DPV 工具由于其集中式架构而难以满足这些要求。具体来说，单点服务器执行实时DPV任务存在瓶颈。此外，单点服务器很难从大规模网络中的每个设备收集实时数据平面更新。

items.title: SkyServe: Serving AI Models across Regions and Clouds with Spot Instances.
items.abstract: Recent years have witnessed an explosive growth of AI models. The high cost of hosting AI services on GPUs and their demanding service requirements, make it timely and challenging to lower service costs and guarantee service quality. While spot instances have long been offered with a large discount, spot preemptions have discouraged users from using them to host model replicas when serving AI models.
items.abstract_zh: 近年来，人工智能模型呈爆炸式增长。由于人工智能服务托管在GPU上的成本较高，且服务要求较高，降低服务成本和保证服务质量面临着及时性和挑战性。虽然现货实例长期以来一直以很大的折扣提供，但现货抢占阻止了用户在服务人工智能模型时使用它们来托管模型副本。

items.title: Moko: Marrying Python with Big Data Systems.
items.abstract: Python stands as the preferred language for data science, thanks to its user-friendly syntax and a robust ecosystem that effortlessly accommodates a variety of data types and workloads, such as relational/tabular data, tensors, and graphs. While Python thrives in smaller data settings, it struggles to scale in distributed big data environments. MOKO is an IR-based execution framework designed to extend Python's reach into the distributed big data domain by generating code that can utilize existing systems such as Spark, Dask, Torch, and GRAPE. Moko preserves Python's key features---interoperability, ease of use, and support for multi-model data types and workloads---while enabling efficient execution in a distributed setting. Our evaluation indicates that MOKO can accelerate Python applications by up to 11× across diverse systems, diminish data alignment overhead by 28×, and outperform hand-optimized solutions by 2.5×.
items.abstract_zh: Python 因其用户友好的语法和强大的生态系统而成为数据科学的首选语言，可以轻松适应各种数据类型和工作负载，例如关系/表格数据、张量和图形。虽然 Python 在较小的数据环境中蓬勃发展，但它在分布式大数据环境中难以扩展。 MOKO 是一个基于 IR 的执行框架，旨在通过生成可利用 Spark、Dask、Torch 和 GRAPE 等现有系统的代码，将 Python 的影响力扩展到分布式大数据领域。 Moko 保留了 Python 的关键特性——互操作性、易用性以及对多模型数据类型和工作负载的支持——同时支持在分布式环境中高效执行。我们的评估表明，MOKO 可以在不同系统上将 Python 应用程序加速高达 11 倍，将数据对齐开销减少 28 倍，并且比手动优化的解决方案性能提高 2.5 倍。

items.title: Empower Vision Applications with LoRA LMM.
items.abstract: Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) have shown significant progress in various complex vision tasks with the solid linguistic and reasoning capacity inherited from large language models (LMMs). Low-rank adaptation (LoRA) offers a promising method to integrate external knowledge into LMMs, compensating for their limitations on domain-specific tasks. However, the existing LoRA model serving is excessively computationally expensive and causes extremely high latency. In this paper, we present an end-to-end solution that empowers diverse vision tasks and enriches vision applications with LoRA LMMs. Our system, VaLoRA, enables accurate and efficient vision tasks by 1) an accuracy-aware LoRA adapter generation approach that generates LoRA adapters rich in domain-specific knowledge to meet application-specific accuracy requirements, 2) an adaptive-tiling LoRA adapters batching operator that efficiently computes concurrent heterogeneous LoRA adapters, and 3) a flexible LoRA adapter orchestration mechanism that manages application requests and LoRA adapters to achieve the lowest average response latency. We prototype VaLoRA on five popular vision tasks on three LMMs. Experiment results reveal that VaLoRA improves 24-62% of the accuracy compared to the original LMMs and reduces 20-89% of the latency compared to the state-of-the-art LoRA model serving systems.
items.abstract_zh: 大型多模态模型（LMM）继承了大型语言模型（LMM）的扎实语言和推理能力，在各种复杂的视觉任务中取得了显着进展。低秩适应 (LoRA) 提供了一种将外部知识集成到 LMM 中的有前途的方法，弥补了它们在特定领域任务上的局限性。然而，现有的 LoRA 模型服务计算成本过高，并且导致极高的延迟。在本文中，我们提出了一种端到端解决方案，可通过 LoRA LMM 实现多样化的视觉任务并丰富视觉应用。我们的系统 VaLoRA 通过以下方式实现准确高效的视觉任务：1) 准确度感知的 LoRA 适配器生成方法，可生成富含特定领域知识的 LoRA 适配器，以满足特定于应用程序的准确度要求；2) 自适应平铺 LoRA 适配器批处理运算符，可有效计算并发异构 LoRA 适配器；3) 灵活的 LoRA 适配器编排机制，可管理应用程序请求和 LoRA 适配器，以实现最低的平均响应延迟。我们在三个 LMM 上针对五种流行的视觉任务对 VaLoRA 进行了原型设计。实验结果表明，与原始 LMM 相比，VaLoRA 的精度提高了 24-62%，与最先进的 LoRA 模型服务系统相比，延迟降低了 20-89%。

items.title: LOFT: A Lock-free and Adaptive Learned Index with High Scalability for Dynamic Workloads.
items.abstract: In order to mitigate memory overheads and reduce data movements in the critical path, a computational and space-efficient learned index is promising to deliver high performance and complement traditional index structures, which unfortunately works well only in static workloads. In dynamic workloads, the learned indexes incur performance degradation with poor scalability due to inefficient data placement for newly inserted items and intensive lock contention. Furthermore, the model retraining is time-consuming and blocking, which hampers the performance of index operations. In order to meet the needs of dynamic workloads and efficient retraining, we propose LOFT, a highly scalable and adaptive learned index with lock-free design and self-tuning retraining technique to provide high throughput and low latency. LOFT enables all index operations to be concurrently executed in a lock-free manner by using Compare-and-Swap (CAS) primitive and an expanded learned bucket to handle the overflowed data. To minimize the impact of model retraining, LOFT leverages a shadow node to serve the clients' requests and accelerates the retraining process with the aid of index operations. To accommodate dynamic workloads, LOFT determines when and how to perform retraining based on inferred access patterns. Our extensive evaluation on YCSB and real-world workloads demonstrates that LOFT effectively improves the performance by up to 14× than state-of-the-art designs.
items.abstract_zh: 为了减轻内存开销并减少关键路径中的数据移动，计算和空间高效的学习索引有望提供高性能并补充传统索引结构，不幸的是，传统索引结构仅在静态工作负载中运行良好。在动态工作负载中，由于新插入项的数据放置效率低下和密集的锁争用，学习索引会导致性能下降和可扩展性差。此外，模型重新训练非常耗时且阻塞，这会影响索引操作的性能。为了满足动态工作负载和高效再训练的需求，我们提出了LOFT，一种高度可扩展和自适应的学习索引，具有无锁设计和自调整再训练技术，以提供高吞吐量和低延迟。 LOFT 通过使用比较和交换（CAS）原语和扩展学习桶来处理溢出数据，使所有索引操作能够以无锁方式并发执行。为了最大限度地减少模型重新训练的影响，LOFT利用影子节点来服务客户的请求，并借助索引操作加速重新训练过程。为了适应动态工作负载，LOFT 根据推断的访问模式确定何时以及如何执行重新训练。我们对 YCSB 和实际工作负载的广泛评估表明，LOFT 有效地将性能比最先进的设计提高了 14 倍。

items.title: CRAVE: Analyzing Cross-Resource Interaction to Improve Energy Efficiency in Systems-on-Chip.
items.abstract: Mobile platforms make use of dynamic voltage and frequency scaling (DVFS) to trade off runtime performance and power consumption for their systems-on-chip (SoCs). State-of-the-art governors in the OS use application-based characteristics to control the SoC's DVFS settings for CPU cores, as well as the GPU in some SoCs. Through experimental characterization of real-world mobile platforms, we find that key SoC components have a complex relationship with one another, which directly affects their performance and power usage. This relationship is dependent on the architecture of the SoC as it is caused by the interaction of processing elements such as the CPU and GPU through a shared main memory. Unfortunately, existing application-oriented governors do not explicitly capture this design-induced relationship.
items.abstract_zh: 移动平台利用动态电压和频率调节 (DVFS) 来权衡片上系统 (SoC) 的运行时性能和功耗。操作系统中最先进的调节器使用基于应用程序的特性来控制 SoC 的 CPU 内核的 D​​VFS 设置，以及某些 SoC 中的 GPU。通过对真实移动平台的实验表征，我们发现关键 SoC 组件之间存在复杂的关系，这直接影响其性能和功耗。这种关系取决于 SoC 的架构，因为它是由 CPU 和 GPU 等处理元件通过共享主内存进行交互引起的。不幸的是，现有的面向应用程序的调控器没有明确捕获这种设计引起的关系。

items.title: Achilles: Efficient TEE-Assisted BFT Consensus via Rollback Resilient Recovery.
items.abstract: BFT consensus that uses Trusted Execution Environments (TEEs) to improve the system tolerance and performance is gaining popularity. However, existing works suffer from TEE rollback issues, resulting in a tolerance-performance tradeoff. In this paper, we propose Achilles, an efficient TEE-assisted BFT protocol that breaks the tradeoff. The key idea behind Achilles is removing the expensive rollback prevention of TEEs from the critical path of committing transactions. To this end, Achilles adopts a rollback resilient recovery mechanism, which allows nodes to assist each other in recovering their states. Besides, Achilles follows the chaining spirit in modern chained BFT protocols and leverages customized chained commit rules to achieve linear message complexity, end-to-end transaction latency of four communication steps, and fault tolerance for the minority of Byzantine nodes. Achilles is the first TEE-assisted BFT protocol in line with CFT protocols in these metrics. We implement a prototype of Achilles based on Intel SGX and evaluate it in both LAN and WAN, showcasing its outperforming performance compared to several state-of-the-art counterparts.
items.abstract_zh: 使用可信执行环境（TEE）来提高系统容错性和性能的 BFT 共识越来越受欢迎。然而，现有的工作存在 TEE 回滚问题，导致容忍度与性能之间的权衡。在本文中，我们提出了 Achilles，一种高效的 TEE 辅助 BFT 协议，打破了这种权衡。 Achilles 背后的关键思想是从提交事务的关键路径中消除 TEE 昂贵的回滚预防。为此，Achilles 采用回滚弹性恢复机制，允许节点互相协助恢复状态。此外，Achilles 遵循现代链式 BFT 协议中的链式精神，利用定制的链式提交规则来实现线性消息复杂性、四个通信步骤的端到端事务延迟以及少数拜占庭节点的容错能力。 Achilles 是第一个在这些指标上与 CFT 协议一致的 TEE 辅助 BFT 协议。我们实现了基于 Intel SGX 的 Achilles 原型，并在 LAN 和 WAN 中对其进行了评估，展示了与几种最先进的同类产品相比其卓越的性能。

items.title: HawkSet: Automatic, Application-Agnostic, and Efficient Concurrent PM Bug Detection.
items.abstract: Persistent Memory (PM) enables the development of fast, persistent applications without employing costly HDD/SSD-based I/O operations. Since caches are volatile and CPUs may reorder and stall memory accesses for performance, developers must use low-level instructions to ensure a consistent state in case of a crash. Failure to do so can result in data corruption, data loss, or undefined behavior. In concurrent executions, this exposes a new class of bugs.
items.abstract_zh: 持久内存 (PM) 可以开发快速、持久的应用程序，而无需使用昂贵的基于 HDD/SSD 的 I/O 操作。由于缓存是易失性的，并且 CPU 可能会为了性能而重新排序和停止内存访问，因此开发人员必须使用低级指令来确保在崩溃时保持一致的状态。否则可能会导致数据损坏、数据丢失或未定义的行为。在并发执行中，这会暴露出一类新的错误。

items.title: Multi-Grained Specifications for Distributed System Model Checking and Verification.
items.abstract: This paper presents our experience specifying and verifying the correctness of ZooKeeper, a complex and evolving distributed coordination system. We use TLA+ to model finegrained behaviors of ZooKeeper and use the TLC model checker to verify its correctness properties; we also check conformance between the model and code. The fundamental challenge is to balance the granularity of specifications and the scalability of model checking---fine-grained specifications lead to state-space explosion, while coarse-grained specifications introduce model-code gaps. To address this challenge, we write specifications with different granularities for composable modules, and compose them into mixed-grained specifications based on specific scenarios. For example, to verify code changes, we compose fine-grained specifications of changed modules and coarse-grained specifications that abstract away details of unchanged code with preserved interactions. We show that writing multi-grained specifications is a viable practice and can cope with model-code gaps without untenable state space, especially for evolving software where changes are typically local and incremental. We detected six severe bugs that violate five types of invariants and verified their code fixes; the fixes have been merged to ZooKeeper. We also improve the protocol design to make it easy to implement correctly.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了我们指定和验证 ZooKeeper（一个复杂且不断发展的分布式协调系统）正确性的经验。我们使用 TLA+ 对 ZooKeeper 的细粒度行为进行建模，并使用 TLC 模型检查器来验证其正确性属性；我们还检查模型和代码之间的一致性。根本的挑战是平衡规范的粒度和模型检查的可扩展性——细粒度的规范会导致状态空间爆炸，而粗粒度的规范会引入模型代码间隙。为了应对这一挑战，我们为可组合模块编写不同粒度的规范，并根据具体场景将其组合成混合粒度的规范。例如，为了验证代码更改，我们编写了更改模块的细粒度规范和粗粒度规范，这些规范通过保留的交互抽象了未更改代码的细节。我们表明，编写多粒度规范是一种可行的实践，并且可以在没有无法维持的状态空间的情况下应对模型代码间隙，特别是对于通常是本地和增量变化的不断发展的软件。我们检测到了六个违反五种不变量的严重错误，并验证了它们的代码修复；这些修复已合并到 ZooKeeper 中。我们还改进了协议设计，使其易于正确实现。

items.title: Comprehensive Deadlock Prevention for GPU Collective Communication.
items.abstract: Distributed deep neural network training necessitates efficient GPU collective communications, which are inherently susceptible to deadlocks. GPU collective deadlocks arise easily in distributed deep learning applications when multiple collectives circularly wait for each other. GPU collective deadlocks pose a significant challenge to the correct functioning and efficiency of distributed deep learning, and no general effective solutions are currently available. Only in specific scenarios, ad-hoc methods, making an application invoke collectives in a consistent order across GPUs, can be used to prevent circular collective dependency and deadlocks.
items.abstract_zh: 分布式深度神经网络训练需要高效的 GPU 集体通信，而这本质上很容易出现死锁。当多个集体相互循环等待时，分布式深度学习应用程序中很容易出现 GPU 集体死锁。 GPU集体死锁对分布式深度学习的正确运行和效率提出了重大挑战，目前还没有通用有效的解决方案。仅在特定场景中，可以使用临时方法（使应用程序在 GPU 上以一致的顺序调用集合）来防止循环集合依赖和死锁。

items.title: Pegasus: Transparent and Unified Kernel-Bypass Networking for Fast Local and Remote Communication.
items.abstract: Modern software architectures in cloud computing are highly reliant on interconnected local and remote services. Popular architectures, such as the service mesh, rely on the use of independent services or sidecars for a single application. While such modular approaches simplify application development and deployment, they also introduce significant communication overhead since now even local communication that is handled by the kernel becomes a performance bottleneck. This problem has been identified and partially solved for remote communication over fast NICs through the use of kernel-bypass data plane systems. However, existing kernel-bypass mechanisms challenge their practical deployment by either requiring code modification or supporting only a small subset of the network interface.
items.abstract_zh: 云计算中的现代软件架构高度依赖互连的本地和远程服务。流行的架构（例如服务网格）依赖于单个应用程序使用独立服务或 sidecar。虽然这种模块化方法简化了应用程序开发和部署，但它们也引入了显着的通信开销，因为现在即使由内核处理的本地通信也成为性能瓶颈。通过使用内核旁路数据平面系统，通过快速 NIC 进行远程通信时，已发现并部分解决了该问题。然而，现有的内核绕过机制需要修改代码或仅支持网络接口的一小部分，从而对它们的实际部署提出了挑战。

items.title: Chrono: Meticulous Hotness Measurement and Flexible Page Migration for Memory Tiering.
items.abstract: As the memory demand continues to surge, the limitations of DRAM scalability have spurred the development of various new memory technologies in today's data centers. In order to harness the benefits of the heterogeneous memory architecture, tiering has become a widely adopted memory management paradigm. The effectiveness of a tiered memory management system primarily relies on its ability to accurately identify frequently accessed ("hot") pages and infrequently accessed ("cold") pages, and efficiently relocate them between tiers. However, existing systems rely on coarse-grained frequency measurement schemes that do not align with the performance characteristics of modern memory devices and memory-intensive applications. Additionally, these systems often incorporate rigid rules or manually configured parameters for page classification, resulting in inflexible migration strategies.
items.abstract_zh: 随着内存需求持续激增，DRAM 可扩展性的限制刺激了当今数据中心各种新型内存技术的发展。为了利用异构内存架构的优势，分层已成为广泛采用的内存管理范例。分层内存管理系统的有效性主要依赖于其准确识别频繁访问（“热”）页面和不经常访问（“冷”）页面并在层之间有效重新定位它们的能力。然而，现有系统依赖于粗粒度频率测量方案，该方案与现代存储设备和内存密集型应用的性能特征不相符。此外，这些系统通常包含严格的规则或手动配置的页面分类参数，导致迁移策略不灵活。

items.title: Empowering WebAssembly with Thin Kernel Interfaces.
items.abstract: Wasm is gaining popularity outside the Web as a well-specified low-level binary format with ISA portability, low memory footprint and polyglot targetability, enabling efficient in-process sandboxing of untrusted code. Despite these advantages, Wasm adoption for new domains is often hindered by the lack of many standard system interfaces which precludes reusability of existing software and slows ecosystem growth.
items.abstract_zh: Wasm 作为一种明确指定的低级二进制格式，具有 ISA 可移植性、低内存占用和多语言目标能力，在 Web 之外越来越受欢迎，能够对不受信任的代码进行高效的进程内沙箱处理。尽管有这些优势，但 Wasm 在新领域的采用常常因缺乏许多标准系统接口而受到阻碍，这些接口阻碍了现有软件的可重用性并减缓了生态系统的增长。

items.title: SeBS-Flow: Benchmarking Serverless Cloud Function Workflows.
items.abstract: Serverless computing has emerged as a prominent paradigm, with a significant adoption rate among cloud customers. While this model offers advantages such as abstraction from the deployment and resource scheduling, it also poses limitations in handling complex use cases due to the restricted nature of individual functions. Serverless workflows address this limitation by orchestrating multiple functions into a cohesive application. However, existing serverless workflow platforms exhibit significant differences in their programming models and infrastructure, making fair and consistent performance evaluations difficult in practice. To address this gap, we propose the first serverless workflow benchmarking suite SeBS-Flow, providing a platform-agnostic workflow model that enables consistent benchmarking across various platforms. SeBS-Flow includes six real-world application benchmarks and four microbenchmarks representing different computational patterns. We conduct comprehensive evaluations on three major cloud platforms, assessing performance, cost, scalability, and runtime deviations. We make our benchmark suite open-source, enabling rigorous and comparable evaluations of serverless workflows over time. Implementation: https://github.com/spcl/serverless-benchmarks Artifact: https://github.com/spcl/sebs-flow-artifact
items.abstract_zh: 无服务器计算已成为一种突出的范例，在云客户中具有显着的采用率。虽然该模型具有从部署和资源调度中进行抽象等优点，但由于各个功能的限制性质，它在处理复杂用例方面也存在局限性。无服务器工作流程通过将多个功能编排到一个内聚的应用程序中来解决此限制。然而，现有的无服务器工作流平台在编程模型和基础设施方面存在显着差异，这使得在实践中难以进行公平一致的性能评估。为了解决这一差距，我们提出了第一个无服务器工作流基准测试套件 SeBS-Flow，提供了一个与平台无关的工作流模型，可以跨不同平台进行一致的基准测试。 SeBS-Flow 包括六个实际应用程序基准和四个代表不同计算模式的微基准。我们对三大云平台进行综合评估，评估性能、成本、可扩展性和运行时偏差。我们将基准套件开源，以便随着时间的推移对无服务器工作流程进行严格且可比较的评估。实现：https://github.com/spcl/serverless-benchmarks 工件：https://github.com/spcl/sebs-flow-artifact

items.title: Efeu: generating efficient, verified, hybrid hardware/software drivers for I2C devices.
items.abstract: Writing device drivers is notoriously hard, and driver bugs are a major cause of system failures and vulnerabilities. The problem is particularly acute in bus-based protocols like I2C, where driver correctness is only half the story: correct functioning of the complete subsystem depends on all components on the bus interoperating correctly. Unfortunately, developers cannot control all aspects of a platform, and must interact with existing devices (peripherals and/or hardware bus controllers) which may misbehave. Failures in a protocol like I2C, often used in critical low-level system management, can result in permanent damage to the hardware, whether a server or a satellite.
items.abstract_zh: 编写设备驱动程序是出了名的困难，驱动程序错误是系统故障和漏洞的主要原因。这个问题在 I2C 等基于总线的协议中尤其严重，其中驱动程序的正确性只是故事的一半：整个子系统的正确运行取决于总线上所有组件的正确互操作。不幸的是，开发人员无法控制平台的所有方面，并且必须与可能出现异常行为的现有设备（外设和/或硬件总线控制器）进行交互。 I2C 等协议（通常用于关键的低级系统管理）的故障可能会导致硬件（无论是服务器还是卫星）的永久性损坏。

items.title: Flex: Fast, Accurate DNN Inference on Low-Cost Edges Using Heterogeneous Accelerator Execution.
items.abstract: Significant b reakthroughs in machine learning (ML) and the advantages of on-device processing have led to edge devices increasingly incorporating accelerators like GPUs, NPUs, and DSPs. However, these accelerators consume energy, prompting users to limit their floating-point precision. Many edge device users are in regions where including high-fidelity accelerators is too costly, leading to low-cost devices with low precision, sacrificing accuracy. Previous work predetermined layer assignments between the CPU and accelerator offline for high accuracy and low latency without considering the input, but we observe that input affects optimal layer assignment. To address this, we present Flex, a system for Fast, Accurate DNN Inference on Low-Cost Edges using Heterogeneous Accelerator eXecution. Leveraging common observations from models on various edge devices, Flex uses a lightweight heuristic and reinforcement learning (RL) to dynamically assign layers across the CPU and accelerator. Experiments show Flex improves average inference time by up to 39%, accuracy by up to 22%, and energy consumption by up to 61% compared to state-of-the-art methods, and is only 4.2% less optimal than the best achievable results.
items.abstract_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 的重大突破和设备上处理的优势导致边缘设备越来越多地采用 GPU、NPU 和 DSP 等加速器。然而，这些加速器会消耗能量，促使用户限制其浮点精度。许多边缘设备用户所处的地区使用高保真加速器的成本太高，导致低成本设备的精度较低，从而牺牲了准确性。之前的工作在不考虑输入的情况下离线预先确定了 CPU 和加速器之间的层分配，以实现高精度和低延迟，但我们观察到输入会影响最佳层分配。为了解决这个问题，我们推出了 Flex，这是一种使用异构加速器执行在低成本边缘上进行快速、准确的 DNN 推理的系统。 Flex 利用各种边缘设备上模型的常见观察结果，使用轻量级启发式和强化学习 (RL) 来跨 CPU 和加速器动态分配层。实验表明，与最先进的方法相比，Flex 的平均推理时间提高了 39%，准确度提高了 22%，能耗降低了 61%，并且仅比可实现的最佳结果差了 4.2%。

items.title: Occamy: A Preemptive Buffer Management for On-chip Shared-memory Switches.
items.abstract: Today's high-speed switches employ an on-chip shared packet buffer. The buffer is becoming increasingly insufficient as it cannot scale with the growing switching capacity. Nonetheless, the buffer needs to face highly intense bursts and meet stringent performance requirements for datacenter applications. This imposes rigorous demand on the Buffer Management (BM) scheme, which dynamically allocates the buffer across queues. However, the de facto BM scheme, designed over two decades ago, is ill-suited to meet the requirements of today's network.
items.abstract_zh: 当今的高速交换机采用片上共享数据包缓冲区。缓冲区变得越来越不足，因为它无法随着交换容量的增长而扩展。尽管如此，缓冲器需要面对高强度的突发并满足数据中心应用严格的性能要求。这对缓冲区管理（BM）方案提出了严格的要求，该方案跨队列动态分配缓冲区。然而，事实上的BM方案是二十多年前设计的，已经不能满足当今网络的要求。

items.title: HybridFlow: A Flexible and Efficient RLHF Framework.
items.abstract: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) is widely used in Large Language Model (LLM) alignment. Traditional RL can be modeled as a dataflow, where each node represents computation of a neural network (NN) and each edge denotes data dependencies between the NNs. RLHF complicates the dataflow by expanding each node into a distributed LLM training or generation program, and each edge into a many-to-many multicast. Traditional RL frameworks execute the dataflow using a single controller to instruct both intra-node computation and inter-node communication, which can be inefficient in RLHF due to large control dispatch overhead for distributed intra-node computation. Existing RLHF systems adopt a multi-controller paradigm, which can be inflexible due to nesting distributed computation and data communication. We propose HybridFlow, which combines single-controller and multi-controller paradigms in a hybrid manner to enable flexible representation and efficient execution of the RLHF data flow. We carefully design a set of hierarchical APIs that decouple and encapsulate computation and data dependencies in the complex RLHF dataflow, allowing efficient operation orchestration to implement RLHF algorithms and flexible mapping of the computation onto various devices. We further design a 3D-HybridEngine for efficient actor model resharding between training and generation phases, with zero memory redundancy and significantly reduced communication overhead. Our experimental results demonstrate 1.53x~20.57× throughput improvement when running various RLHF algorithms using HybridFlow, as compared with state-of-the-art baselines. HybridFlow source code is available at https://github.com/volcengine/verl
items.abstract_zh: 来自人类反馈的强化学习 (RLHF) 广泛应用于大型语言模型 (LLM) 对齐中。传统的强化学习可以建模为数据流，其中每个节点代表神经网络 (NN) 的计算，每条边表示 NN 之间的数据依赖关系。 RLHF 通过将每个节点扩展为分布式 LLM 训练或生成程序，并将每个边缘扩展为多对多多播，使数据流变得复杂。传统的 RL 框架使用单个控制器执行数据流来指示节点内计算和节点间通信，由于分布式节点内计算的控制调度开销较大，这在 RLHF 中效率较低。现有的RLHF系统采用多控制器范式，由于嵌套的分布式计算和数据通信，该范式可能不灵活。我们提出了 HybridFlow，它以混合方式结合了单控制器和多控制器范例，以实现 RLHF 数据流的灵活表示和高效执行。我们精心设计了一组分层 API，将复杂的 RLHF 数据流中的计算和数据依赖关系解耦和封装，从而允许高效的操作编排来实现 RLHF 算法，并将计算灵活映射到各种设备上。我们进一步设计了一个 3D-HybridEngine，用于在训练和生成阶段之间进行高效的参与者模型重新分片，具有零内存冗余并显着减少了通信开销。我们的实验结果表明，与最先进的基线相比，使用 HybridFlow 运行各种 RLHF 算法时，吞吐量提高了 1.53 倍~20.57 倍。 HybridFlow 源代码位于 https://github.com/volcengine/verl

items.title: A Hardware-Software Co-Design for Efficient Secure Containers.
items.abstract: VM-level containers provide strong isolation by running each container with its own kernel in a VM. However, they rely on virtualization hardware designed for general-purpose VMs, causing non-negligible performance overhead compared to OS-level containers. This performance gap widens dramatically in nested virtualization scenarios, where secure containers run inside a VM.
items.abstract_zh: VM 级容器通过在 VM 中运行具有自己内核的每个容器来提供强大的隔离。然而，它们依赖于为通用虚拟机设计的虚拟化硬件，与操作系统级容器相比，导致了不可忽略的性能开销。在安全容器在虚拟机内运行的嵌套虚拟化场景中，这种性能差距急剧扩大。

items.title: MEPipe: Democratizing LLM Training with Memory-Efficient Slice-Level Pipeline Scheduling on Cost-Effective Accelerators.
items.abstract: The training of large language models (LLMs) typically needs costly GPUs, such as NVIDIA A100 or H100. They possess substantial high-bandwidth on-chip memory and rapid interconnects like NVLinks. The exorbitant expenses associated with LLM training pose not just an economic challenge but also a societal one, as it restricts the ability to train LLMs from scratch to a selected few organizations.
items.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 的训练通常需要昂贵的 GPU，例如 NVIDIA A100 或 H100。它们拥有大量高带宽片上存储器和 NVLink 等快速互连。与法学硕士培训相关的高昂费用不仅带来了经济挑战，而且还带来了社会挑战，因为它限制了从零开始向选定的少数组织培训法学硕士的能力。

items.title: DPack: Efficiency-Oriented Privacy Budget Scheduling.
items.abstract: Machine learning (ML) models can leak information about users, and differential privacy (DP) provides a rigorous way to bound that leakage under a given budget. This DP budget can be regarded as a new type of computing resource in workloads of multiple ML models training on user data. Once it is used, the DP budget is forever consumed. Therefore, it is crucial to allocate it most efficiently to train as many models as possible. This paper presents a scheduler for the privacy resources that optimizes for efficiency. We formulate privacy scheduling as a new type of multidimensional knapsack problem, called privacy knapsack, which maximizes DP budget efficiency. We show that privacy knapsack is NP-hard, hence practical algorithms are necessarily approximate. We develop an approximation algorithm for privacy knapsack, DPack, and evaluate it on microbenchmarks and on a new, synthetic private-ML workload we developed from the Alibaba ML cluster trace. We show that DPack: (1) often approaches the efficiency-optimal schedule, (2) consistently schedules more tasks compared to a state-of-the-art privacy scheduling algorithm that focused on fairness instead of efficiency (1.3-1.7× in Alibaba, 1.0-2.6X in microbenchmarks), but (3) sacrifices some level of fairness for efficiency. Using DPack, DP ML operators should be able to train more models on the same amount of user data while offering the same privacy guarantee to their users.
items.abstract_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 模型可能会泄露有关用户的信息，而差分隐私 (DP) 提供了一种严格的方法来将这种泄露限制在给定的预算范围内。这种 DP 预算可以被视为在用户数据上训练多个 ML 模型的工作负载中的一种新型计算资源。一旦使用，DP预算就永远被消耗掉。因此，最有效地分配它来训练尽可能多的模型至关重要。本文提出了一种优化效率的隐私资源调度程序。我们将隐私调度制定为一种新型的多维背包问题，称为隐私背包，它最大化 DP 预算效率。我们证明隐私背包是 NP 困难的，因此实际算法必然是近似的。我们开发了一种隐私背包 DPack 的近似算法，并在微基准测试和我们根据阿里巴巴 ML 集群跟踪开发的新的合成私有 ML 工作负载上对其进行评估。我们证明，DPack：（1）经常接近效率最优调度，（2）与关注公平而不是效率的最先进的隐私调度算法相比，一致地调度更多任务（阿里巴巴为 1.3-1.7 倍，微基准为 1.0-2.6 倍），但是（3）为了效率而牺牲了一定程度的公平性。使用 DPack，DP ML 运营商应该能够在相同数量的用户数据上训练更多模型，同时为用户提供相同的隐私保证。

items.title: Achieving Fairness Generalizability for Learning-based Congestion Control with Jury.
items.abstract: Internet congestion control (CC) has long posed a challenging control problem in networking systems, with recent approaches increasingly incorporating deep reinforcement learning (DRL) to enhance adaptability and performance. Despite promising, DRL-based CC schemes often suffer from poor fairness, particularly when applied to network environments unseen during training.
