This paper introduces Jury, a novel DRL-based CC scheme designed to achieve fairness generalizability. At its heart, Jury decouples the fairness control from the principal DRL model with two design elements: i) By transforming network signals, it provides a universal view of network environments among competing flows, and ii) It adopts a post-processing phase to dynamically module the sending rate based on flow bandwidth occupancy estimation, ensuring large flows behave more conservatively and smaller flows more aggressively, thus achieving a fair and balanced bandwidth allocation. We have fully implemented Jury, and extensive evaluations demonstrate its robust convergence properties and high performance across a broad spectrum of both emulated and real-world network conditions.
items.abstract_zh: 互联网拥塞控制（CC）长期以来一直在网络系统中提出具有挑战性的控制问题，最近的方法越来越多地结合深度强化学习（DRL）来增强适应性和性能。尽管很有前景，但基于 DRL 的 CC 方案常常缺乏公平性，特别是当应用于训练期间看不见的网络环境时。本文介绍了 Jury，一种新颖的基于 DRL 的 CC 方案，旨在实现公平泛化性。从本质上讲，Jury通过两个设计元素将公平控制与主要DRL模型解耦：i）通过转换网络信号，提供竞争流之间网络环境的通用视图；ii）采用后处理阶段，根据流带宽占用估计动态调整发送速率，确保大流表现得更保守，小流表现得更积极，从而实现公平和平衡的带宽分配。我们已经全面实施了 Jury，广泛的评估证明了其强大的收敛特性以及在广泛的模拟和现实网络条件下的高性能。

items.title: Bingo: Radix-based Bias Factorization for Random Walk on Dynamic Graphs.
items.abstract: Random walks are a primary means for extracting information from large-scale graphs. While most real-world graphs are inherently dynamic, state-of-the-art random walk engines failed to efficiently support such a critical use case. This paper takes the initiative to build a general random walk engine for dynamically changing graphs with two key principles: (i) This system should support both low-latency streaming updates and high-throughput batched updates. (ii) This system should achieve fast sampling speed while maintaining acceptable space consumption to support dynamic graph updates. Upholding both standards, we introduce Bingo, a GPU-based random walk engine for dynamically changing graphs. First, we propose a novel radix-based bias factorization algorithm to support constant time sampling complexity while supporting fast streaming updates. Second, we present a group-adaption design to reduce space consumption dramatically. Third, we incorporate GPU-aware designs to support high-throughput batched graph updates on massively parallel platforms. Together, Bingo outperforms existing efforts across various applications, settings, and datasets, achieving up to a 271.11x speedup compared to the state-of-the-art efforts.
items.abstract_zh: 随机游走是从大规模图中提取信息的主要手段。虽然大多数现实世界的图表本质上是动态的，但最先进的随机游走引擎无法有效地支持这样一个关键的用例。本文主动构建了一个用于动态变化图的通用随机游走引擎，具有两个关键原则：（i）该系统应支持低延迟流式更新和高吞吐量批量更新。 (ii) 该系统应实现快速采样速度，同时保持可接受的空间消耗以支持动态图更新。秉承这两个标准，我们推出了 Bingo，这是一种基于 GPU 的随机游走引擎，用于动态更改图形。首先，我们提出了一种新颖的基于基数的偏差分解算法，以支持恒定时间采样复杂性，同时支持快速流更新。其次，我们提出了一种群体适应设计，以大幅减少空间消耗。第三，我们采用 GPU 感知设计来支持大规模并行平台上的高吞吐量批量图形更新。总之，Bingo 在各种应用程序、设置和数据集上都优于现有的工作，与最先进的工作相比，速度提高了 271.11 倍。

items.title: CAPSys: Contention-aware task placement for data stream processing.
items.abstract: In the context of streaming dataflow queries, the task placement problem aims to identify a mapping of operator tasks to physical resources in a distributed cluster. We show that task placement not only significantly affects query performance but also the convergence and accuracy of auto-scaling controllers. We propose CAPSys, an adaptive resource controller for dataflow stream processors, that considers auto-scaling and task placement in concert. CAPSys relies on Contention-Aware Placement Search (CAPS), a new placement strategy that ensures compute-intensive, I/O-intensive, and networkintensive tasks are balanced across available resources.
items.abstract_zh: 在流数据流查询的背景下，任务放置问题旨在识别操作员任务到分布式集群中物理资源的映射。我们表明，任务放置不仅会显着影响查询性能，还会显着影响自动缩放控制器的收敛性和准确性。我们提出了 CAPSys，一种用于数据流流处理器的自适应资源控制器，它同时考虑自动缩放和任务放置。 CAPSys 依赖于竞争感知放置搜索 (CAPS)，这是一种新的放置策略，可确保计算密集型、I/O 密集型和网络密集型任务在可用资源之间实现平衡。

items.title: Byte vSwitch: A High-Performance Virtual Switch for Cloud Networking.
items.abstract: Virtual switch is a fundamental component of cloud computing as it provides core networking functionalities for VMs and containers. Open vSwitch (OVS) is widely adopted in cloud environments due to its open-source nature, programmability, and rich set of features. At ByteDance, we initially adopted OVS in our public cloud, but as our cloud business grew, its generic design along with its complex code-base quickly became obstacles to improvements. Hence, we developed Byte vSwitch (BVS), a high-performance virtual switch that was specifically designed to address the performance, scalability, serviceability, and operational efficiency needs of our cloud services. More specifically, BVS adopts a simple architecture with an optimized hash table to maximize forwarding performance. In addition, we introduced several optimizations to improve BVS scalability, operability, and serviceability in cloud environments. Our evaluations show that BVS achieves up to 3.3× higher PPS and 25% lower latency compared to OVS. BVS has been deployed at scale across all regions of the ByteDance public cloud for over four years, and this paper presents our experience in designing, deploying, and operating BVS in production.
items.abstract_zh: 虚拟交换机是云计算的基本组成部分，因为它为虚拟机和容器提供核心网络功能。 Open vSwitch (OVS) 因其开源特性、可编程性和丰富的功能而在云环境中得到广泛采用。在字节跳动，我们最初在公有云中采用了 OVS，但随着云业务的增长，其通用设计以及复杂的代码库很快成为改进的障碍。因此，我们开发了 Byte vSwitch (BVS)，这是一种高性能虚拟交换机，专门用于满足云服务的性能、可扩展性、可服务性和运营效率需求。更具体地说，BVS 采用简单的架构和优化的哈希表来最大限度地提高转发性能。此外，我们还引入了多项优化来提高 BVS 在云环境中的可扩展性、可操作性和可服务性。我们的评估表明，与 OVS 相比，BVS 的 PPS 提高了 3.3 倍，延迟降低了 25%。 BVS 已在字节跳动公有云的所有区域大规模部署了四年多，本文介绍了我们在生产中设计、部署和运营 BVS 的经验。

items.title: Deft: A Scalable Tree Index for Disaggregated Memory.
items.abstract: Memory disaggregation has become an inexorable trend in data centers and the cloud. By physically separating compute and memory resources into independent pools and connecting them with high-speed networks, memory disaggregation enables high resource utilization and elastic resource scaling. However, traditional tree-based indexes become inefficient on disaggregated memory: (1) large tree nodes can easily saturate network bandwidth due to I/O amplification, yet small tree nodes increase network round trips; (2) expensive concurrency control schemes restrict the scalability.
items.abstract_zh: 内存分解已成为数据中心和云的必然趋势。通过将计算和内存资源物理上分离到独立的池中并将它们与高速网络连接，内存分解可以实现高资源利用率和弹性资源扩展。然而，传统的基于树的索引在分解内存上变得低效：（1）大的树节点很容易由于I/O放大而使网络带宽饱和，而小的树节点会增加网络往返次数； (2)昂贵的并发控制方案限制了可扩展性。

items.title: T-MAC: CPU Renaissance via Table Lookup for Low-Bit LLM Deployment on Edge.
items.abstract: The deployment of Large Language Models (LLMs) on edge devices is increasingly important to enhance on-device intelligence. Weight quantization is crucial for reducing the memory footprint of LLMs on devices. However, low-bit LLMs necessitate mixed precision matrix multiplication (mpGEMM) of low precision weights and high precision activations during inference. Existing systems, lacking native support for mpGEMM, resort to dequantize weights for high precision computation. Such an indirect way can lead to a significant inference overhead.
items.abstract_zh: 在边缘设备上部署大型语言模型 (LLM) 对于增强设备上的智能变得越来越重要。权重量化对于减少 LLM 在设备上的内存占用至关重要。然而，低位 LLM 需要在推理过程中进行低精度权重和高精度激活的混合精度矩阵乘法 (mpGEMM)。现有系统缺乏对 mpGEMM 的原生支持，只能通过去量化权重来实现高精度计算。这种间接的方式可能会导致显着的推理开销。

items.title: HyperAlloc: Efficient VM Memory De/Inflation via Hypervisor-Shared Page-Frame Allocators.
items.abstract: The provisioning of the right amount of DRAM to virtual machines (VMs) is still a major challenge and cost driver in virtualization settings. Many VMs run applications with highly volatile memory demands, which either leads to massive overprovisioning in low-demand phases or poor QoS in high-demand phases. Memory hotplugging and ballooning have become established techniques (in Linux/KVM available via virtio-mem and virtio-balloon) to dynamically de/inflate the physical memory of a VM cooperatively, by having the guests give back unused memory to the hypervisor. However, current VM deflation techniques are either not DMA-safe, preventing the passthrough of important devices like GPUs or NICs, or are not flexible or fast enough to cope with the frequently changing demands of the guest.
items.abstract_zh: 向虚拟机 (VM) 提供适量的 DRAM 仍然是虚拟化设置中的主要挑战和成本驱动因素。许多虚拟机运行的应用程序具有高度易失性的内存需求，这要么导致低需求阶段的大量过度配置，要么导致高需求阶段的 QoS 较差。内存热插拔和气球膨胀已成为成熟的技术（在 Linux/KVM 中可通过 virtio-mem 和 virtio-balloon 实现），通过让来宾将未使用的内存返还给虚拟机管理程序，动态地动态减少/膨胀 VM 的物理内存。然而，当前的 VM 压缩技术要么不是 DMA 安全的，从而阻止了 GPU 或 NIC 等重要设备的直通，要么不够灵活或不够快，无法满足来宾频繁变化的需求。

items.title: Samoyeds: Accelerating MoE Models with Structured Sparsity Leveraging Sparse Tensor Cores.
items.abstract: The escalating size of Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) based Large Language Models (LLMs) presents significant computational and memory challenges, necessitating innovative solutions to enhance efficiency without compromising model accuracy. Structured sparsity emerges as a compelling strategy to address these challenges by leveraging the emerging sparse computing hardware. Prior works mainly focus on the sparsity in model parameters, neglecting the inherent sparse patterns in activations. This oversight can lead to additional computational costs associated with activations, potentially resulting in suboptimal performance.
items.abstract_zh: 基于专家混合 (MoE) 的大型语言模型 (LLM) 的规模不断扩大，带来了巨大的计算和内存挑战，需要创新的解决方案来提高效率而不影响模型的准确性。结构化稀疏性成为一种引人注目的策略，可以利用新兴的稀疏计算硬件来应对这些挑战。先前的工作主要关注模型参数的稀疏性，忽略了激活中固有的稀疏模式。这种疏忽可能会导致与激活相关的额外计算成本，从而可能导致性能不佳。

items.title: Pre-Stores: Proactive Software-guided Movement of Data Down the Memory Hierarchy.
items.abstract: International audience
items.abstract_zh: 国际观众

items.title: Hey Hey, My My, Skewness Is Here to Stay: Challenges and Opportunities in Cloud Block Store Traffic.
items.abstract: Elastic Block Storage (EBS) has a pivotal role in modern data center infrastructure, providing reliable, high-performance and flexible block storage service to users. In Alibaba Cloud, EBS is the most widely used service and has been supporting the operation of millions of virtual disks. However, even with layers of load balancing and caching, we still observe significant traffic skewness across the EBS stack. This motivates us to comprehensively investigate symptoms and root causes behind the traffic patterns and, more importantly, explore the fixes for the identified issues.
items.abstract_zh: 弹性块存储（EBS）在现代数据中心基础设施中发挥着举足轻重的作用，为用户提供可靠、高性能、灵活的块存储服务。在阿里云中，EBS是使用最广泛的服务，已经支撑了数百万个虚拟磁盘的运行。然而，即使有负载平衡和缓存层，我们仍然观察到整个 EBS 堆栈上存在显着的流量偏差。这促使我们全面调查流量模式背后的症状和根本原因，更重要的是，探索已识别问题的解决方案。

items.title: eNetSTL: Towards an In-kernel Library for High-Performance eBPF-based Network Functions.
items.abstract: Using extended Berkeley Packet Filter (eBPF) to implement networking functions (NFs) has been a promising trend for modern network infrastructure. In this paper, we endeavor to implement 35 representative NFs with eBPF, but encounter inherent problems of either incomplete functionality or performance degradation of up to 49.2%. Conventional solutions like modifying the eBPF infrastructure or implementing functions directly in the kernel can lead to intrusive and unstable modifications.
items.abstract_zh: 使用扩展的伯克利数据包过滤器 (eBPF) 来实现网络功能 (NF) 已成为现代网络基础设施的一个有前途的趋势。在本文中，我们尝试使用 eBPF 实现 35 个具有代表性的 NF，但遇到了功能不完整或性能下降高达 49.2% 的固有问题。修改 eBPF 基础设施或直接在内核中实现功能等传统解决方案可能会导致侵入性和不稳定的修改。

items.title: DeltaZip: Efficient Serving of Multiple Full-Model-Tuned LLMs.
items.abstract: Fine-tuning large language models (LLMs) greatly improves model quality for downstream tasks. However, serving many fine-tuned LLMs concurrently is challenging due to the sporadic, bursty, and varying request patterns of different LLMs. To bridge this gap, we present DeltaZip, an LLM serving system that efficiently serves multiple full-parameter fine-tuned models concurrently by aggressively compressing model deltas by up to 10× while maintaining high model quality. The key insight behind this design is that fine-tuning results in small-magnitude changes to the pre-trained model. By co-designing the serving system with the compression algorithm, DeltaZip achieves 2× to 12× improvement in throughput compared to the state-of-the-art systems.
items.abstract_zh: 微调大型语言模型 (LLM) 极大地提高了下游任务的模型质量。然而，由于不同法学硕士的请求模式是零星的、突发的和变化的，同时为许多经过微调的法学硕士提供服务是一项挑战。为了弥补这一差距，我们推出了 DeltaZip，这是一种 LLM 服务系统，可通过将模型增量压缩高达 10 倍，同时保持高模型质量，从而有效地同时服务多个全参数微调模型。这种设计背后的关键见解是微调会导致预训练模型发生小幅度的变化。通过共同设计服务系统和压缩算法，与最先进的系统相比，DeltaZip 的吞吐量提高了 2 倍到 12 倍。

items.title: CacheBlend: Fast Large Language Model Serving for RAG with Cached Knowledge Fusion.
items.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) often incorporate multiple text chunks in their inputs to provide the necessary contexts. To speed up the prefill of the long LLM inputs, one can pre-compute the KV cache of a text and re-use the KV cache when the context is reused as the prefix of another LLM input. However, the reused text chunks are not always the input prefix, which makes precomputed KV caches not directly usable since they ignore the text's cross-attention with the preceding texts. Thus, the benefits of reusing KV caches remain largely unrealized.
items.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 通常在其输入中合并多个文本块以提供必要的上下文。为了加速长 LLM 输入的预填充，可以预先计算文本的 KV 缓存，并在上下文被重新用作另一 LLM 输入的前缀时重新使用 KV 缓存。然而，重用的文本块并不总是输入前缀，这使得预先计算的 KV 缓存不能直接使用，因为它们忽略了文本与前面文本的交叉注意力。因此，重用 KV 缓存的好处在很大程度上仍未实现。

items.title: Adios to Busy-Waiting for Microsecond-scale Memory Disaggregation.
items.abstract: How fast and efficiently page faults are handled determines the performance of paging-based memory disaggregation (MD) systems. Recent MD systems employ busy-waiting in page fault handling to avoid costly interrupt handling and context switching. Upon a page fault, they issue a remote fetch request and busy-wait for the completion of the request rather than yield their execution to other tasks. While these attempts succeed to cut the latency of MD systems to microseconds, they suffer from head-of-line (HOL) blocking that leads to high tail latency and causes RDMA network underutilization.
items.abstract_zh: 处理页面错误的速度和效率决定了基于分页的内存分解 (MD) 系统的性能。最近的 MD 系统在页面错误处理中采用忙等待来避免昂贵的中断处理和上下文切换。出现页面错误时，它们会发出远程获取请求并忙等待请求的完成，而不是将其执行交给其他任务。虽然这些尝试成功地将 MD 系统的延迟缩短至微秒，但它们受到队头 (HOL) 阻塞的影响，导致尾部延迟较高并导致 RDMA 网络利用率不足。

items.title: AlloyStack: A Library Operating System for Serverless Workflow Applications.
items.abstract: Serverless workflow applications, composed of multiple serverless functions, are increasingly popular in production. However, inter-function communication and cold start latency remain key performance bottlenecks. This paper introduces AlloyStack, a library operating system (LibOS) tailored for serverless workflows. AlloyStack addresses two major challenges: (1) reducing cold start latency through on-demand OS component loading and (2) minimizing data transfer overhead by enabling functions within the same workflow to share a single address space, eliminating unnecessary data copying. To ensure secure isolation, AlloyStack uses Memory Protection Keys (MPK) to separate user functions from the LibOS while maintaining efficient data sharing. Our evaluation shows that AlloyStack reduces cold start times by 98.5% to just 1.3ms. Compared to SOTA systems, AlloyStack achieves a 7.3× to 38.7× speedup in Rust end-to-end latency and a 4.8× to 78.3× speedup in other languages for intermediate data-intensive workflows.
items.abstract_zh: 由多个无服务器功能组成的无服务器工作流应用程序在生产中越来越流行。然而，功能间通信和冷启动延迟仍然是关键的性能瓶颈。本文介绍了 AlloyStack，这是一个专为无服务器工作流程量身定制的图书馆操作系统 (LibOS)。 AlloyStack 解决了两个主要挑战：(1) 通过按需操作系统组件加载来减少冷启动延迟；(2) 通过使同一工作流程中的功能能够共享单个地址空间，从而消除不必要的数据复制，从而最大限度地减少数据传输开销。为了确保安全隔离，AlloyStack 使用内存保护密钥 (MPK) 将用户功能与 LibOS 分离，同时保持高效的数据共享。我们的评估表明，AlloyStack 将冷启动时间缩短了 98.5%，仅为 1.3 毫秒。与 SOTA 系统相比，AlloyStack 在 Rust 端到端延迟方面实现了 7.3 倍到 38.7 倍的加速，在其他语言的中间数据密集型工作流程中实现了 4.8 倍到 78.3 倍的加速。

items.title: Stateful Large Language Model Serving with Pensieve.
items.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are wildly popular today and it is important to serve them efficiently. Existing LLM serving systems are stateless across requests. Consequently, when LLMs are used in the common setting of multi-turn conversations, a growing log of the conversation history must be processed alongside any request by the serving system at each turn, resulting in repeated processing.
items.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 如今非常流行，有效地为它们提供服务非常重要。现有的 LLM 服务系统在请求之间是无状态的。因此，当 LLM 用于多轮对话的常见设置时，每次服务系统必须处理不断增长的对话历史记录以及任何请求，从而导致重复处理。

items.title: NeuStream: Bridging Deep Learning Serving and Stream Processing.
items.abstract: Modern Deep Neural Network (DNN) exhibits a pattern where multiple sub-models are executed, guided by control flows such as loops and switch/merge operations. This dynamic nature introduces complexities in batching the requests of such DNNs for efficient execution on GPUs. In this paper, we present NeuStream, a programming model and runtime system for serving deep learning workloads using stream processing. NeuStream decomposes the inference workflow into modules and forms them into a streaming processing system where a request flows through. Based on such abstraction, NeuStream is able to batch requests at fine-grained module granularity. To maximize serving goodput, NeuStream exploits a two-level scheduling approach to decide the best batching requests and resource allocation for each module while satisfying service level objectives (SLOs). Our evaluation of NeuStream on a set of modern DNNs like Large Language Models (LLM) and diffusion models, etc., shows that NeuStream significantly improves goodput compared to state-of-the-art DNN serving systems.
items.abstract_zh: 现代深度神经网络 (DNN) 呈现出一种执行多个子模型的模式，由循环和切换/合并操作等控制流引导。这种动态特性带来了批处理此类 DNN 请求以在 GPU 上高效执行的复杂性。在本文中，我们提出了 NeuStream，一种编程模型和运行时系统，用于使用流处理来服务深度学习工作负载。 NeuStream将推理工作流程分解为模块，并将其形成请求流经的流处理系统。基于这样的抽象，NeuStream能够以细粒度的模块粒度对请求进行批处理。为了最大限度地提高服务吞吐量，NeuStream 利用两级调度方法来决定每个模块的最佳批处理请求和资源分配，同时满足服务级别目标 (SLO)。我们在一组现代 DNN（例如大型语言模型 (LLM) 和扩散模型等）上对 NeuStream 进行的评估表明，与最先进的 DNN 服务系统相比，NeuStream 显着提高了吞吐量。

items.title: JABAS: Joint Adaptive Batching and Automatic Scaling for DNN Training on Heterogeneous GPUs.
items.abstract: Adaptive batching is a promising technique to reduce the communication and synchronization overhead for training Deep Neural Network (DNN) models. In this paper, we study how to speed up the training of a DNN model using adaptive batching, without degrading the convergence performance in a heterogeneous GPU cluster. We propose a novel DNN training system, called JABAS (Joint Adaptive Batching and Automatic Scaling). In JABAS, a DNN training job is executed on a DNN training framework called IIDP, which provides the same theoretical convergence rate of distributed SGD in a heterogeneous GPU cluster. To maximize the performance of the job with adaptive batching, JABAS employs adaptive batching and automatic resource scaling jointly. JABAS changes a global batch size every p iterations in a fine-grained manner within an epoch, while auto-scaling to the best GPU allocation for the next epoch in a coarse-grained manner. Using three heterogeneous GPU clusters, we evaluate JABAS for seven DNN models including large language models. Our experimental results demonstrate that JABAS provides 33.3% shorter training time and 54.2% lower training cost than the state-of-the-art adaptive training techniques, on average, without any accuracy loss.
items.abstract_zh: 自适应批处理是一种很有前途的技术，可以减少训练深度神经网络 (DNN) 模型的通信和同步开销。在本文中，我们研究如何使用自适应批处理加速 DNN 模型的训练，而不降低异构 GPU 集群中的收敛性能。我们提出了一种新颖的 DNN 训练系统，称为 JABAS（联合自适应批处理和自动缩放）。在 JABAS 中，DNN 训练作业在称为 IIDP 的 DNN 训练框架上执行，该框架提供与异构 GPU 集群中的分布式 SGD 相同的理论收敛速度。为了通过自适应批处理最大限度地提高作业性能，JABAS 联合采用自适应批处理和自动资源扩展。 JABAS 在一个时期内以细粒度的方式每 p 次迭代更改全局批量大小，同时以粗粒度的方式自动缩放到下一个时期的最佳 GPU 分配。使用三个异构 GPU 集群，我们评估了七个 DNN 模型（包括大型语言模型）的 JABAS。我们的实验结果表明，与最先进的自适应训练技术相比，JABAS 的训练时间平均缩短了 33.3%，训练成本降低了 54.2%，且没有任何准确性损失。

items.title: Improving GPU Sharing Performance through Adaptive Bubbleless Spatial-Temporal Sharing.
items.abstract: Data centers now allow multiple applications that have lightweight workloads to share a GPU. Existing temporal or spatial sharing systems struggle to provide efficient and accurate quota assignments. We observe that the performance of the multi-user system is often underestimated because of the existence of unused GPU "bubbles" and can be enhanced by squeezing the bubbles. Based on this observation, we design Bless, a bubble-less spatial-temporal sharing GPU system that fine-tunes the GPU resource allocation to improve multi-user performance. Bless leverages precise computing resource management and fine-grained kernel scheduling to ensure stringent quota guarantees and reduce latency fairly for applications with varying GPU quotas. We implement and evaluate Bless with multiple applications and workloads. Our result shows that Bless achieves 21.1% - 37.3% average latency reduction over the state-of-the-art while guaranteeing the promised quota for all applications.
items.abstract_zh: 数据中心现在允许多个具有轻量级工作负载的应用程序共享 GPU。现有的时间或空间共享系统难以提供高效且准确的配额分配。我们观察到，由于存在未使用的 GPU“气泡”，多用户系统的性能常常被低估，并且可以通过挤压气泡来增强性能。基于这一观察，我们设计了 Bless，一种无气泡时空共享 GPU 系统，可以微调 GPU 资源分配以提高多用户性能。 Bless 利用精确的计算资源管理和细粒度的内核调度来确保严格的配额保证，并公平地减少具有不同 GPU 配额的应用程序的延迟。我们使用多个应用程序和工作负载来实施和评估 Bless。我们的结果表明，与最先进的技术相比，Bless 的平均延迟降低了 21.1% - 37.3%，同时保证了所有应用程序的承诺配额。

items.title: Overcoming the Last Mile between Log-Structured File Systems and Persistent Memory via Scatter Logging.
items.abstract: Log-structured file system (LFS) has been a popular option for persistent memory (PM) for its high write performance and lightweight crash consistency protocols. However, even with PM's byte-addressable I/O interface, existing PM LFSes still maintain contiguous space for log locality while using heavy garbage collection (GC) to synchronously reclaim space, causing up to 50% I/O performance degradation on PM. Thus, there exists a last-mile problem between the contiguous space management of LFS (that induces GC) and the non-contiguous byte-addressability of PM.
items.abstract_zh: 日志结构文件系统 (LFS) 因其高写入性能和轻量级崩溃一致性协议而成为持久内存 (PM) 的流行选择。然而，即使使用 PM 的字节可寻址 I/O 接口，现有的 PM LFS 仍然为日志局部性维护连续的空间，同时使用大量垃圾收集 (GC) 同步回收空间，导致 PM 上的 I/O 性能下降高达 50%。因此，LFS的连续空间管理（引发GC）和PM的非连续字节寻址之间存在最后一英里问题。

items.title: Erebor: A Drop-In Sandbox Solution for Private Data Processing in Untrusted Confidential Virtual Machines.
items.abstract: Confidential virtual machines (CVMs) are designed to protect data in cloud machines, but they fail in this task in common Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) cloud environments. In such settings, the software stack within a CVM, including service programs and the operating system, that receives and processes data may intentionally disclose it to attackers. We present Erebor, a sandboxing architecture for CVMs that processes client data in secure containers, where restrictions apply to both (a) access by all untrusted outside components and (b) the sandbox's ability to communicate data through memory and software-controlled direct or covert exits. Erebor enables such restrictions through a security monitor design based on intra-kernel privilege isolation for CVM, fully compatible with emerging cloud deployments without requiring host modifications. Under realistic scenarios, such as large language model inference and private information retrieval, Erebor only adds a performance overhead of 4.5%-13.2%, demonstrating its practicality in terms of enabling strong data sandboxing in modern cloud machines.
items.abstract_zh: 机密虚拟机 (CVM) 旨在保护云计算机中的数据，但在常见的软件即服务 (SaaS) 云环境中，它们无法完成此任务。在此类设置中，CVM 内接收和处理数据的软件堆栈（包括服务程序和操作系统）可能会故意将数据泄露给攻击者。我们提出了 Erebor，这是一种用于 CVM 的沙箱架构，可在安全容器中处理客户端数据，其中限制适用于 (a) 所有不受信任的外部组件的访问以及 (b) 沙箱通过内存和软件控制的直接或隐蔽出口通信数据的能力。 Erebor 通过基于 CVM 内核内权限隔离的安全监控设计来实现此类限制，完全兼容新兴云部署，无需修改主机。在大型语言模型推理、隐私信息检索等现实场景下，Erebor仅增加了4.5%-13.2%的性能开销，展示了其在现代云机器中实现强数据沙箱方面的实用性。

items.title: Cheetah: Metadata Aggregation for Fast Object Storage without Distributed Ordering.
items.abstract: Object stores usually maintain the mapping of objects to data servers' disk volumes (referred to as volume metadata) in a central directory, while storing the object data's in-volume offsets (referred to as offset metadata) together with the data on data servers. Unfortunately, the separation between volume/offset metadata complicates the processing of an object put: to ensure consistency, the multiple writes of the object's volume/offset metadata and object data have to be orchestrated in a particular order, which severely lowers object I/O performance. We propose a write-optimal structure called MetaX that aggregates all metadata of a put, including both volume and offset metadata as well as other meta information such as data checksum and temporary meta-log. Based on MetaX, we design the Cheetah object store, which organizes object storage into rich metadata storage (on meta servers) and raw data storage (on data servers). Cheetah removes the distributed ordering constraint on the multiple metadata/data writes by enforcing local atomicity of writing MetaX, while still ensuring consistency. Evaluation shows that Cheetah significantly outperforms existing object stores.
items.abstract_zh: 对象存储通常在中央目录中维护对象到数据服务器磁盘卷（称为卷元数据）的映射，同时将对象数据的卷内偏移量（称为偏移元数据）与数据服务器上的数据一起存储。不幸的是，卷/偏移量元数据之间的分离使对象写入的处理变得复杂：为了确保一致性，对象的卷/偏移量元数据和对象数据的多次写入必须按特定顺序编排，这严重降低了对象 I/O 性能。我们提出了一种名为 MetaX 的写入优化结构，它聚合了 put 的所有元数据，包括卷和偏移元数据以及其他元信息，例如数据校验和和临时元日志。基于MetaX，我们设计了Cheetah对象存储，它将对象存储组织为丰富的元数据存储（在元服务器上）和原始数据存储（在数据服务器上）。 Cheetah 通过强制写入 MetaX 的本地原子性，消除了对多个元数据/数据写入的分布式排序约束，同时仍然确保一致性。评估表明，Cheetah 的性能明显优于现有的对象存储。

items.title: Enabling Virtual Priority in Data Center Congestion Control.
items.abstract: In data center networks, various types of traffic with strict performance requirements operate simultaneously, necessitating effective isolation and scheduling through priority queues. However, most switches support only around ten priority queues. Virtual priority can address this limitation by emulating multi-priority queues on a single physical queue, but existing solutions often require complex switch-level scheduling and hardware changes. Our key insight is that virtual priority can be achieved by carefully managing bandwidth contention in a physical queue, which is traditionally handled by congestion control (CC) algorithms. Hence, the virtual priority mechanism needs to be tightly coupled with CC. In this paper, we propose PrioPlus, a CC enhancement algorithm that can be integrated with existing congestion control schemes to enable virtual priority transmission. PrioPlus assigns specific delay ranges to different priority levels, ensuring that flows transmit only when the delay is within the assigned range, effectively meeting virtual priority requirements. Compared to Swift CC with physical priority queues, PrioPlus provides strict priority for high-priority flows without impacting performance sensibly. Meanwhile, it benefits low-priority flows from 25% to 41% as its priority-aware design enhances CC's ability to fully utilize available bandwidth once higher-priority traffic completes. As a result, in coflow and model training scenarios, PrioPlus improves job completion times by 21% and 33%, respectively, compared to Swift with physical priority queues.
items.abstract_zh: 在数据中心网络中，各种类型、性能要求严格的流量同时运行，需要通过优先级队列进行有效的隔离和调度。然而，大多数交换机仅支持大约十个优先级队列。虚拟优先级可以通过在单个物理队列上模拟多优先级队列来解决此限制，但现有解决方案通常需要复杂的交换机级调度和硬件更改。我们的主要见解是，可以通过仔细管理物理队列中的带宽争用来实现虚拟优先级，而物理队列传统上是由拥塞控制 (CC) 算法处理的。因此，虚拟优先级机制需要与CC紧密耦合。在本文中，我们提出了PrioPlus，一种CC增强算法，可以与现有的拥塞控制方案集成以实现虚拟优先级传输。 PrioPlus为不同的优先级分配特定的延迟范围，保证流只有在延迟范围内时才传输，有效满足虚拟优先级要求。与具有物理优先级队列的 Swift CC 相比，PrioPlus 为高优先级流提供严格的优先级，而不会明显影响性能。同时，它使低优先级流量从 25% 增加到 41%，因为其优先级感知设计增强了 CC 在高优先级流量完成后充分利用可用带宽的能力。因此，在协同流和模型训练场景中，与具有物理优先级队列的 Swift 相比，PrioPlus 的作业完成时间分别提高了 21% 和 33%。

items.title: Revealing the Unstable Foundations of eBPF-Based Kernel Extensions.
items.abstract: eBPF programs significantly enhance kernel capabilities, but encounter substantial compatibility challenges due to their deep integration with unstable kernel internals. We introduce DepSurf, a tool that identifies dependency mismatches between eBPF programs and kernel images. Our analysis of 25 kernel images spanning 8 years reveals that dependency mismatches are pervasive, stemming from kernel source code evolution, diverse configuration options, and intricate compilation processes. We apply DepSurf to 53 real-world eBPF programs, and find that 83% are impacted by dependency mismatches, underscoring the urgent need for systematic dependency analysis. By identifying these mismatches, DepSurf enables a more robust development and maintenance process for eBPF programs, enhancing their reliability across a wide range of kernels.
items.abstract_zh: eBPF 程序显着增强了内核功能，但由于它们与不稳定的内核内部深度集成，因此遇到了巨大的兼容性挑战。我们引入了 DepSurf，这是一个识别 eBPF 程序和内核映像之间依赖关系不匹配的工具。我们对跨越 8 年的 25 个内核映像的分析表明，依赖项不匹配非常普遍，这源于内核源代码的演变、多样化的配置选项和复杂的编译过程。我们将 DepSurf 应用于 53 个现实世界的 eBPF 程序，发现 83% 受到依赖项不匹配的影响，这凸显了系统依赖项分析的迫切需要。通过识别这些不匹配，DepSurf 为 eBPF 程序提供了更强大的开发和维护流程，从而增强了它们在各种内核中的可靠性。

items.title: Mist: Efficient Distributed Training of Large Language Models via Memory-Parallelism Co-Optimization.
items.abstract: Various parallelism, such as data, tensor, and pipeline parallelism, along with memory optimizations like activation checkpointing, redundancy elimination, and offloading, have been proposed to accelerate distributed training for Large Language Models. To find the best combination of these techniques, automatic distributed training systems are proposed. However, existing systems only tune a subset of optimizations, due to the lack of overlap awareness, inability to navigate the vast search space, and ignoring the inter-microbatch imbalance, leading to sub-optimal performance. To address these shortcomings, we propose Mist, a memory, overlap, and imbalance-aware automatic distributed training system that comprehensively co-optimizes all memory footprint reduction techniques alongside parallelism. Mist is based on three key ideas: (1) fine-grained overlap-centric scheduling, orchestrating optimizations in an overlapped manner, (2) symbolic-based performance analysis that predicts runtime and memory usage using symbolic expressions for fast tuning, and (3) imbalance-aware hierarchical tuning, decoupling the process into an inter-stage imbalance and overlap aware Mixed Integer Linear Programming problem and an intra-stage Dual-Objective Constrained Optimization problem, and connecting them through Pareto frontier sampling. Our evaluation results show that Mist achieves an average of 1.28× (up to 1.73×) and 1.27× (up to 2.04×) speedup compared to state-of-the-art manual system Megatron-LM and state-of-the-art automatic system Aceso, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 人们提出了各种并行性（例如数据、张量和管道并行性）以及内存优化（例如激活检查点、冗余消除和卸载）来加速大型语言模型的分布式训练。为了找到这些技术的最佳组合，提出了自动分布式训练系统。然而，由于缺乏重叠意识、无法导航巨大的搜索空间以及忽略微批次间的不平衡，现有系统仅调整优化的子集，从而导致性能次佳。为了解决这些缺点，我们提出了 Mist，一种内存、重叠和不平衡感知的自动分布式训练系统，可全面共同优化所有内存占用减少技术以及并行性。 Mist 基于三个关键思想：(1) 以重叠为中心的细粒度调度，以重叠方式编排优化；(2) 基于符号的性能分析，使用符号表达式预测运行时和内存使用情况以进行快速调优；(3) 不平衡感知分层调优，将过程解耦为阶段间不平衡和重叠感知混合整数线性规划问题和阶段内双目标约束优化问题，并通过 Pareto 前沿采样将它们连接起来。我们的评估结果表明，与最先进的手动系统 Megatron-LM 和最先进的自动系统 Aceso 相比，Mist 分别实现了平均 1.28 倍（高达 1.73 倍）和 1.27 倍（高达 2.04 倍）的加速。

items.title: Impeller: Stream Processing on Shared Logs.
items.abstract: Current stream processing systems provide exactly-once semantics using checkpointing or a combination of logging and checkpointing. These approaches can introduce high overhead, significantly increasing the latency for normal stream processing because maintaining exactly-once semantics requires coordination across distributed nodes and streams to capture a globally consistent state. We observe that modern distributed shared logs offer a promising solution for maintaining exactly-once semantics with a small overhead. We propose Impeller, a stream processing system that uses a distributed shared log for data storage and exactly-once processing. To maintain exactly-once semantics, Impeller includes a novel and efficient progress marking protocol based on string tags and selective reads in a shared log. The key idea is to leverage the log's record-tagging feature to atomically mark progress across all streams. The experiments over the NEXMark benchmark show that Impeller achieves 1.3× to 5.4× lower p50 latency, or 1.3× to 5.0× higher saturation throughput than Kafka Streams.
items.abstract_zh: 当前的流处理系统使用检查点或日志记录和检查点的组合提供一次性语义。这些方法可能会带来很高的开销，显着增加正常流处理的延迟，因为维护一次性语义需要跨分布式节点和流进行协调以捕获全局一致的状态。我们观察到，现代分布式共享日志提供了一种有前途的解决方案，可以以较小的开销维护一次语义。我们提出了 Impeller，一种使用分布式共享日志进行数据存储和一次性处理的流处理系统。为了维护一次性语义，Impeller 包含了一种新颖且高效的进度标记协议，该协议基于字符串标签和共享日志中的选择性读取。关键思想是利用日志的记录标记功能来自动标记所有流的进度。 NEXMark 基准测试的实验表明，与 Kafka Streams 相比，Impeller 的 p50 延迟降低了 1.3 倍到 5.4 倍，饱和吞吐量提高了 1.3 倍到 5.0 倍。

items.title: SpaceFusion: Advanced Deep Learning Operator Fusion via Space-Mapping Graph.
items.abstract: This work proposes SpaceFusion, an advanced scheduler for efficient deep learning operator fusion. First, we develop a novel abstraction, the Space-Mapping Graph (SMG), to holistically model the spatial information of both inter- and intra-operator dependencies. Subsequently, we introduce the spatial and temporal slicers to decompose the fused spaces defined in SMGs, generating fusion schedules by analyzing and transforming dependencies. Finally, we present auto-scheduling methods that use the slicers to automatically create high-performance fusion schedules tailored to specific hardware resource configurations. End-to-end performance evaluations reveal that SpaceFusion achieves up to 8.79x speedup (3.54x on average) over baseline implementations from Huggingface for Transformer models, and a maximum of 2.21x speedup compared to the state-of-the-art manually-tuned implementations powered by FlashAttention.
items.abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了 SpaceFusion，一种用于高效深度学习算子融合的高级调度程序。首先，我们开发了一种新颖的抽象，即空间映射图（SMG），以对运算符间和运算符内依赖性的空间信息进行整体建模。随后，我们引入空间和时间切片器来分解 SMG 中定义的融合空间，通过分析和转换依赖关系生成融合调度。最后，我们提出了自动调度方法，使用切片器自动创建适合特定硬件资源配置的高性能融合调度。端到端性能评估表明，与 Huggingface 的 Transformer 模型基准实现相比，SpaceFusion 实现了高达 8.79 倍的加速（平均 3.54 倍），与由 FlashAttention 支持的最先进的手动调整实现相比，最多实现了 2.21 倍的加速。
